item.title: 如何在 AppGyver 中集成外部 API 端点 | How to integrate external API endpoints in AppGyver
item.description:
随着低代码/无代码平台的出现，构建应用程序变得更加容易。 现在我们对平台有了清晰的了解，让我们深入了解在平台中集成外部 API 端点的功能和分步指南。

第 1 步：在 AppGyver 中打开您的项目并转到“数据”按钮
进入项目后，转到工具栏顶部的数据按钮，以创建新的外部数据资源或编辑现有数据资源。

步骤 2：添加数据资源
进入数据选项卡后，通过单击右上角的加号转到“添加数据资源”，其中将包含 5 个不同选项的下拉列表，我们将从中选择 — 用于集成外部 API 端点的 Rest API 直接集成。


第 3 步：基本配置
资源配置分为 GET 收集、GET 记录、POST、PUT/PATCH 和 DELETE 的基本配置和方法配置。

基本配置：

在这里，您定义基本配置：

  • 资源 ID：应用中资源的唯一 ID
  • 路径变量：用于使部分 URL 动态化
  • 标头：要包含在对该外部资源进行的每个 API 调用中的 HTTP 标头
  • 查询参数：要包含在对该外部资源进行的每个 API 调用中的参数

后端的规范

在这里，我们将使用Canonic生成我们需要与 AppGyver 集成的所有必需的 API 端点。
在 Canonic 中，您可以通过以下方式直接获取基本配置：
在 Canonic → 文档部分中转到您的项目 → 复制 URL

准备好 URL 后，返回 AppGyver 并将它们放置在所需的位置，如下图所示。
有了它，你的基本配置就准备好了！ 探索 API 方法

现在我们已经有了基本配置，让我们看看如何将所有这些不同的方法集成到我们的项目中。

获取收藏（GET）：

基本 URL 将自动反映在所有其他选项卡中。 因此，您现在所要做的就是填写相对路径/响应键和测试 API 调用响应。

对于 Get Collection，不需要特定的 id，因为我们正在从服务器检索数据集合。

因此，将使用相对路径和响应键。
响应键——来自 API 的 JSON 响应可能包含我们在主响应对象的键中感兴趣的实际数据。

在佳能的情况下是数据：

如果你正确地遵循和测试，你会得到这样的东西：


同样，您所要做的就是复制 Canonic 随时可用的所需 URL，将它们放在专用字段中。

获取记录（获取）：

现在要检索一些数据，我们需要指定我们需要获取哪些数据，因此我们需要传递 id 和访问令牌（代表特定应用程序访问用户数据特定部分的授权）。

转到 Canon — 选择产品 (GET) — 从端点部分复制 URL。

由于已经设置了基本 URL，我们只需将 /products/:_id 粘贴到 AppGyver 的相对路径部分。

现在，我们需要传递 id，您可以通过以下方式获取：
复制id并传入Appygyver的Relative路径

访问令牌：这大致有两个步骤
由于我们使用 Canonic 作为后端，因此可以在几分钟内创建访问令牌。

转到设置→ AccessTokens → 创建新令牌 → 为其命名并提供访问权限 → 单击创建 → 复制值。

在 AppGyver 中，访问令牌需要嵌入到 HTTP 标头部分，您需要以下字段：

在 AppGyver 的配置选项卡 → Http Header → 在右侧面板上填写所有必需的详细信息：

转到“测试”选项卡以运行测试，并在 URL 占位符中提及我们之前复制的产品的 ID。

访问令牌到位后，运行测试（在这里您还需要提及 id），就是这样！

您已成功从服务器检索数据✅

创建记录（发布）：

在这里，我们将需要指定要存储在服务器中的数据。

让我们看看如何做到这一点👇 转到 Canon - 文档部分 - 选择创建产品（帖子）- 从端点部分复制 URL。 转到 AppGyver -> CREATE RECORD (POST) → 粘贴相对路径****

由于已经设置了基本 URL，我们只需将所需的特定字段粘贴到相对路径部分。



原文:

With the advent of low-code/no-code platforms, building applications has become much easier. The AppGyver platform is one such no-code platform where you can develop applications without having to code.

Now that we have a clear understanding of the platform, let’s dive into the functioning and step-by-step guide to integrate external API endpoints in the platform.

Step 1: Open your Project in AppGyver & Go to the Data button
Once you are inside your project, go to the Data button at the top of the toolbar, to create new external data resources or to edit the existing ones.

Step 2: Add Data Resources
Once you’re into the data tab go to the Add Data Resources by clicking on plus sign in the top right corner, which will have a dropdown of 5 different options from which we will select — Rest API direct Integration to integrate external API endpoint.


Step 3: Base Configuration
The resource configuration is split into base configuration and method configurations for GET collection, GET record, POST, PUT/PATCH and DELETE.

Base Configuration:

Here, you define the base configuration:

  • Resource ID: unique ID for the resource in your app
  • Base URL: URL shared between all methods
  • Path variables: Use to make parts of the URL dynamic
  • Headers: HTTP headers to be included in every API call made to this external resource
  • Query parameters: Parameters to be included in every API call made to this external resource

Canonic for the Backend

Here, we will be using Canonic to generate all the required APIs endpoints that we need to integrate with AppGyver.
Canonic is a low-code platform for your backend that helps you craft APIs in minutes.

In Canonic, you can directly get your Base Configuration by:
Going to your project in Canonic → Docs section → Copy the URL

Once you have your URLs ready, get back on AppGyver and place them at the required spot as shown in the picture below.
With that, you have your base configuration ready! 💃

Exploring the API methods

Now that we have our base config in place, let’s see how can we integrate all these different methods in our project.

Get Collection (GET):

The base URL will automatically reflect in all other tabs. So, all you now have to do is fill in the Relative path/ Response key and Test API call response.

For Get Collection, there’s no specific id required because we are retrieving the collection of data from a server.

Thus, will go in with the Relative path and Response key.
Response key — The JSON response from an API might include the actual data we are interested in inside a key of the main response object.

Which in Canonic’s case is data:

If you’ve correctly followed and tested, you’ll get something like this:


Similarly, all you have to do is copy the required URL which you get readily available with Canonic, put them in dedicated fields.

GET RECORD (GET):

GET method is used to retrieve data from a server at the specified resource.

Now to retrieve some data, we need to specify which data we are required to fetch, and hence we’ll need to pass the id and Access Tokens (represent the authorization of a specific application to access specific parts of a user’s data).

Go to Canonic — Select Product (GET) — Copy the URL from the endpoint section.

As the base URL is already set we will just paste /products/:_id on AppGyver’s Relative path section.

Now, we need to pass the id, which you can get by following:
Canonic → Project → CMS section → Under the CMS entry title you can see the id (shown in the image below).


Copy the id and pass in the Relative path of Appygyver

Access Tokens: This broadly has two steps
1. Creating Access Token in the backend:
As we are using Canonic as our backend, the access tokens can be created within minutes.

Go to settings→ AccessTokens → Create A New Token → Give it a name and provide access → click on create → copy the value.

2. Embedding access Token in AppGyver:
In AppGyver, the access tokens need to be embedded in the HTTP Header section, where you’ll require the below fields:

In the config tab of AppGyver → Http Header → On the right-hand side panel fill all the required details:

Key: The exact key name of the authorization Label: Name this as per your understanding Value type: Text Description: Description of the token

Go to the Test tab to run a test and in the URL placeholder, mention the id of the product that we copied earlier.

Once the access token is in place, run a test (here you need to mention the id as well) and that’s it!

You’ve successfully retrieved data from a server ✅

CREATE RECORD (POST):

A POST is used to create or update a resource on a server. POST data is sent to the server in the request body of the HTTP request.

Here, we will require to specify the data that we want to store in the server.

Let’s see how to do that 👇 Go to Canonic — Docs Section — Select Create product (post)- Copy the URL from the endpoint section. Go to AppGyver -> CREATE RECORD (POST) → paste the relative path ****

As the base URL is already set we will just paste the required specific field on the Relative path’s section.
item.author: tanisha

item.title: 创建协作 javascript 电子表格变得容易 | Creating collabrative javascript spreadsheet made easy
item.description:
在上一篇文章中，我们介绍了如何使用FortuneSheet创建 javascript 电子表格。 这次，我们将向您展示如何启用它的协作功能。

后端

在进入主题之前，首先要考虑的是后端存储，因为必须保存工作表数据，以便其他人在进入页面时可以看到最新的工作表状态。

这里我们选择 Express 作为后端服务器，MongoDB 作为数据库。 在此演示中，我们只是将集合的所有文档用于演示工作簿的工作表。

 async function getData () { const db = client . db ( dbName ); return await db . collection ( collectionName ). find (). toArray (); }

我们将跳过创建简单快递服务器的代码，而专注于核心代码。 不用担心，您可以在本文末尾找到完整的代码。

然后，添加一些用于处理 websocket 消息的代码，并管理用于广播的连接。

 const connections = {}; const broadcastToOthers = ( selfId , data ) => { Object . values ( connections ). forEach (( ws ) => { if ( ws . id !== selfId ) { ws . send ( data ); } }); }; const wss = new SocketServer ({ server , path : " /ws " }); wss . on ( " connection " , ( ws ) => { ws . id = uuid . v4 (); connections [ ws . id ] = ws ; ws . on ( " message " , async ( data ) => { const msg = JSON . parse ( data . toString ()); if ( msg . req === " getData " ) { ws . send ( JSON . stringify ({ req : msg . req , data : await getData (), }) ); } else if ( msg . req === " op " ) { await applyOp ( client . db ( dbName ). collection ( collectionName ), msg . data ); broadcastToOthers ( ws . id , data . toString ()); } }); ws . on ( " close " , () => { delete connections [ ws . id ]; }); });

在这里， applyOp函数是协作的核心。 它读取我们前端库发送的Op ，并对数据库进行数据突变。

处理操作

The Op s are generated by the patch of Immer.js , for example, here is an op when user sets the cell font to be bold on cell A2. Op是由Immer.js的补丁生成的，例如，这是用户在单元格 A2 上将单元格字体设置为粗体时的操作。

 [ { "op" : "replace" , "index" : "0" , "path" : [ "data" , 1 , 0 , "bl" ], "value" : 1 }
]

我们必须将此操作转换为 MongoDB 更新查询。 如果我们直接转换它，结果将如下所示：

 db . updateOne ( { index : " 0 " }, { $set : { " data.1.0.bl " : 1 } } );

但是，考虑到存储大小，我们将单元格数据稀疏地存储在数据库中，也就是说，我们不是存储整个二维单元格数组，而是存储一个包含值的一维单元格数组。 因此，数据库中的一个单元格的形式为

{ r : number , // row index c : number , // column index v : any , // cell value }

上面的更新查询变为：

 db . updateOne ( { index : " 0 " }, { $set : { " celldata.$[e].v.bl " : 1 } }, { arrayFilters : [{ " er " : 1 , " ec " : 0 }] } );

对工作表其他字段的更新类似。

这就是我们所有的后端服务器。 完整代码见https://github.com/ruilisi/fortune-sheet/tree/master/backend-demo

前端

现在让我们关注前端部分，这很简单。

第一步，创建一个websocket连接。

 const wsRef = useRef < WebSocket > (); useEffect (() => { const socket = new WebSocket ( " ws://localhost:8081/ws " ); wsRef . current = socket ; socket . onopen = () => { socket . send ( JSON . stringify ({ req : " getData " })); }; }, []);

第 2 步，从本地更改发送操作，从其他人接收操作并将它们应用到工作簿中。

 // A ref of Workbook const workbookRef = useRef < WorkbookInstance > ( null ); // In useEffect socket . onmessage = ( e ) => { const msg = JSON . parse ( e . data ); if ( msg . req === " getData " ) { setData ( msg . data ); } else if ( msg . req === " op " ) { workbookRef . current ?. applyOp ( msg . data ); } }; // Workbook declaration < Workbook ref = { workbookRef } onOp = { ( op ) => socket . send ( JSON . stringify ({ req : " op " , data : op })) } />

完整代码参考https://github.com/ruilisi/fortune-sheet/blob/master/stories/Collabration.stories.tsx

谢谢阅读

该 repo 托管在Github上，完全开源。 觉得有用就给我们点个星吧😄。 非常感谢您的反馈！



原文:

In the last post, we have introduced how to create a javascript spreadsheet using FortuneSheet. This time, we will show you how to enable it's collabration feature.

Backend

Before we get into the topic, the first thing to be considered is backend storage, as the sheet data have to be saved so that others can see the lastest sheet state when they enter the page.

Websocket is our main transport of exchanging live data among clients. Here we choose Express as backend server, and MongoDB as database. The main role of express server is to manage websocket connection, serve initial data and process incremental op messages.

In this demo we simply use all documents of a collection for the sheets of our demo workbook.

async function getData() { const db = client.db(dbName); return await db.collection(collectionName).find().toArray();
}

We will skip the code of creating a simple express server, and focus on the core code. Don't worry, you can find the complete code at the end of this post.

Then, add some code for processing websocket messages, and manage connections for broadcasting.

const connections = {}; const broadcastToOthers = (selfId, data) => { Object.values(connections).forEach((ws) => { if (ws.id !== selfId) { ws.send(data); } });
}; const wss = new SocketServer({ server, path: "/ws" }); wss.on("connection", (ws) => { ws.id = uuid.v4(); connections[ws.id] = ws; ws.on("message", async (data) => { const msg = JSON.parse(data.toString()); if (msg.req === "getData") { ws.send( JSON.stringify({ req: msg.req, data: await getData(), }) ); } else if (msg.req === "op") { await applyOp(client.db(dbName).collection(collectionName), msg.data); broadcastToOthers(ws.id, data.toString()); } }); ws.on("close", () => { delete connections[ws.id]; });
});

Here, the applyOp function is the core of collabration. It reads the Ops sent by our frontend library, and perform data mutations to the database.

Processing Ops

The Ops are generated by the patch of Immer.js, for example, here is an op when user sets the cell font to be bold on cell A2.

[ { "op": "replace", "index": "0", "path": ["data", 1, 0, "bl"], "value": 1 }
]

We have to convert this op into MongoDB update query. If we convert it directly, the result will look like:

db.updateOne( { index: "0" }, { $set: { "data.1.0.bl": 1 } }
);

However, considering storage size, we stores cell data sparsely in the database, that is, instead of storing the entire 2-dimension cell array, we store a 1-dimension array of cells that contain values. Thus, a cell in the database is in the form of

{ r: number, // row index c: number, // column index v: any, // cell value
}

and the above update query becomes:

db.updateOne( { index: "0" }, { $set: { "celldata.$[e].v.bl": 1 } }, { arrayFilters: [{ "e.r": 1, "e.c": 0 }] }
);

Updates to others fields of the sheet are similar.

And that's all of our backend server. For the complete code, see https://github.com/ruilisi/fortune-sheet/tree/master/backend-demo

Frontend

Now let's focus on the frontend part, which is quite simple.

Step 1, create a websocket connection.

const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket>(); useEffect(() => { const socket = new WebSocket("ws://localhost:8081/ws"); wsRef.current = socket; socket.onopen = () => { socket.send(JSON.stringify({ req: "getData" })); };
}, []);

Step 2, send ops from local change, receive ops from others and apply them into the workbook.

// A ref of Workbook
const workbookRef = useRef<WorkbookInstance>(null); // In useEffect
socket.onmessage = (e) => { const msg = JSON.parse(e.data); if (msg.req === "getData") { setData(msg.data); } else if (msg.req === "op") { workbookRef.current?.applyOp(msg.data); }
}; // Workbook declaration
<Workbook ref={workbookRef} onOp={(op) => socket.send(JSON.stringify({ req: "op", data: op }))} />

For the complete code, refer to https://github.com/ruilisi/fortune-sheet/blob/master/stories/Collabration.stories.tsx

Thanks for reading

The repo is hosted on Github, completely open source. Give us a star if you find it useful 😄. Feedbacks are much appreciated!
item.author: zyc9012

item.title: GitHub 应用程序和 OAuth ~ 实用 Kick-Starter | GitHub App and OAuth ~ Practical Kick-Starter
item.description:
一个界面，让经过 GitHub 身份验证的用户（或任何用户的组织）能够查看他的哪些存储库安装了给定的 GitHub 应用程序。

前提

我找到了两种不同的方法来实现目标。

  1. 独立提供程序（GitHub 应用程序）
  2. 脱节流（OAuth 应用程序、GitHub 应用程序）。

如果您知道其他方式，请与我联系（推特） 。

在这篇文章中，我们正在实施第一种模式。

指数

  1. 创建 GitHub 应用

    为了让我们找到安装了GitHub 应用程序的存储库列表，我们必须首先创建一个.

    就本文而言，我们只需要知道要通过 GitHub 对用户进行身份验证，您需要注册自己的 OAuth 应用程序； 但是， 每个 GitHub 应用程序内部都有一个 OAuth 。

    这就是为什么我（任意）称这个方法为独立的——我们只使用一个 GitHub 应用程序。

    • 主页网址： http://localhost:3000
    • 回调 URL ：一旦身份验证流程完成，提供者应将用户发回的位置。 您可以选择任何路线，我正在使用/oauth/github/login/callback
    • 设置 URL ：一旦 GitHub 安装/卸载/权限更改，提供者应将用户发回的位置。 你可以选择任何路线，我正在使用/new 。

    配置应用程序，使其有权读取内容。 否则，它将无法安装在特定的 repos 上。

    您还将找到一个Webhook部分。 出于本文的目的，我们不在乎，因此要继续，您只需将其标记为不活动即可。

    最后创建 GitHub 应用程序。 它已被分配了一个 App ID、一个客户端 ID ，并且可以生成一个客户端密码——我们需要的所有东西，但需要一点时间。

    如果有不清楚的地方，请参考配套回购。

首先，前端呈现一个指向服务器上的路由的 CTA。

 <a id= "oauth-github" > Authenticate via GitHub </a> <script> const CLIENT_ID = " Iv1.395930440f268143 " ; const url = new URL ( " /login/oauth/authorize " , " https://github.com " ); url . searchParams . set ( " client_id " , CLIENT_ID ); document . getElementById ( " oauth-github " ) . setAttribute ( " href " , url ); </script>

注意：安全

为了简洁起见，我只报告client_id ，因为它是必需的； 但是，在生产环境中，请务必查看官方文档，尤其是有关scope和state的文档。

让它漂亮，给它添加 GitHub 图标 - 用户按下它并被带到以下页面：

现在，当按下绿色授权按钮时，用户将被重定向到在 GitHub 应用程序创建期间设置的回调 URL 。

让我们确保服务器能够监听/oauth/github/login/callback 。 注意这个关键步骤：GitHub 重定向并添加一个查询参数，这是验证用户身份所需的code 。

 server . get ( " /oauth/github/login/callback " , async ( request , reply ) => { const { code } = request . query ; // ... });

现在，在继续之前，请返回您的 GitHub 应用程序配置页面并生成新的客户端密码。 因此， dotenv它。

 const { code } = request . query ; const exchangeURL = new URL ( " login/oauth/access_token " , " https://github.com " ); exchangeURL . searchParams . set ( " client_id " , process . env . CLIENT_ID ); exchangeURL . searchParams . set ( " client_secret " , process . env . CLIENT_SECRET ); exchangeURL . searchParams . set ( " code " , code ); const response = await axios . post ( exchangeURL . toString (), null , { headers : { Accept : " application/json " , }, }); const { access_token } = response . data ;

为简洁起见，该示例不报告错误处理。 它留给读者的常识。

因此，令牌被传递给最终被重定向到某个/new路由的客户端。 但是 - 这是我们故事的主角 - 也接收access_token作为查询参数。

 const { access_token } = response . data ; const redirectionURL = new URL ( " new " , " http://localhost:3000 " ); redirectionURL . searchParams . set ( " access_token " , access_token ); reply . status ( 302 ). header ( " Location " , redirectionURL ). send ();

在客户端解压：

 <!-- new.html, sent when GET /new --> <script> const access_token = new URL ( window . location ). searchParams . get ( " access_token " ); localStorage . setItem ( " access_token " , access_token ); </script>

您可以将它存储在内存中的任何 Web 存储中，这实际上取决于您的界面的使用方式。 尽管HttpOnly和Secure cookie 将有助于缓解XSS 攻击。

认证用户的客户端在合法查询GitHub REST API时，最终可以关联access_token 。 差不多好了。

增强：弹出而不是重定向

通常其他的 OAuth不会硬重定向当前页面。 假设正在做一个 SPA，想想发现这个流程清空了你的内存存储是多么可悲。 易于解决，重定向仍然会发生，但在生成的弹出窗口（帖子）中，在溶解之前会将access_token传递回主选项卡。

查询 GitHub REST API

我们需要的数据是从两个端点返回的。

  1. 后者使用从前者接收到的信息被调用。

    该文档指出：

    您必须使用为已授权您的 GitHub 应用程序的用户创建的用户到服务器 OAuth 访问令牌来访问此端点。

    但是，有一种方法可以使用 OAuth 和其他三个不同的端点使其工作。 这显示在第二篇文章中。

     const githubAPI = axios . create ({ baseURL : " https://api.github.com " , headers : { Accept : " application/vnd.github.v3+json " , }, }); const authorizationConf = { headers : { authorization : `token ${ access_token } ` , }, }; ( async () => { const installationResponse = await githubAPI . get ( " user/installations " , authorizationConf ); })();

    官方文档推荐设置为application/vnd.github.v3+json 。 它是GitHub API 自定义媒体类型。

    我们收到一个列表，其中包含...等等，它是空的。 那是因为尚未在任何地方安装 GitHub 应用程序。

    让我们让它易于安装：

     <a href= "https://github.com/apps/<github-app-name>/installations/new" > Change permissions </a>

    单击后会显示以下屏幕：

    选择您的个人帐户或您的组织之一。 或两者。 将它安装在某个地方。

    现在/user/installations返回安装列表。 每个帐户（个人帐户 || 组织）至少有一个安装了 github 应用程序的存储库。

    每个项目都有属性id 。 这是下一个端点所需的installation_id 。

     const promises = installationsResponse . data . installations . map ( ( installation ) => { return githubAPI . get ( `user/installations/ ${ installation . id } /repositories` , authorizationConf ); } ); // parallel const responses = await axios . all ( promises ); const repositories = responses . map (( response ) => { return response . data . repositories ; });

    在那里，您拥有经过身份验证的用户或他的组织之一安装了GitHub 应用程序的所有repositories 。

    结语

    回顾一下，您现在可以：

    • 通过 GitHub OAuth 身份验证对用户进行身份验证
    • 重定向用户以安装您的 GitHub 应用程序
    • 向他们显示一个下拉列表，其中包含除个人帐户之外的所有组织
    • 知道要显示哪些存储库

    我将把使用你最喜欢的框架实现 UI 的所有乐趣留给你。 如果您需要查看完整的导览，请在随附的 repo中使用任何人都知道的技术。

    相关文章

    将在未来几天内发布

    • 封面图片

    联系人



原文:

An interface that gives a GitHub-authenticated user (or any user's organization) the ability to see which of his repositories have a given GitHub App installed.

Vercel's Import Git Repository component

Premise

I found two different ways to achieve the goal.

  1. Standalone provider (GitHub App)
  2. Disjointed flow (OAuth App, GitHub App).

If you know of other modalities, please contact me (twitter).

In this post we are implementing the first modality.

Index

  1. Create GitHub App
  2. GitHub OAuth
  3. Query the GitHub REST API
  4. Related Posts

Create GitHub App

In order for us to find the list of repos that have the GitHub App installed, we must first create one.

For the purposes of this post, we just need to know that to authenticate a user through GitHub, you need to register your own OAuth app; however, every GitHub App has an OAuth inside it.

That's why I (arbitrarily) call this method standalone - we only use a single GitHub App.

  • Homepage URL: http://localhost:3000
  • Callback URL: Where the provider should send back the user once the authentication flow is completed. You can pick any route, I'm using /oauth/github/login/callback
  • Setup URL: Where the provider should send back the user once the GitHub has been installed/uninstalled/permission-changed. You can pick any route, I'm using /new.

Configure the app so that it has the right to read the content. Otherwise, it won't be able to be installed on specific repos.

You'll also find a Webhook section. For the purposes of this post we don't care, so to continue you can just mark it as inactive.

Finally create the GitHub App. It has been assigned an App ID, a Client ID and it's possible to generate a Client Secret - All the stuff we need, but in a little while.

GitHub OAuth

Authenticating a user with GitHub is straight forward.

If something isn't clear kindly refer to companion repo.

First, the frontend presents a CTA which points to a route on the server.

<a id="oauth-github">Authenticate via GitHub</a>
<script> const CLIENT_ID = "Iv1.395930440f268143"; const url = new URL("/login/oauth/authorize", "https://github.com"); url.searchParams.set("client_id", CLIENT_ID); document.getElementById("oauth-github") .setAttribute("href", url);
</script>

Note: security

To remain concise, I'm only reporting client_id since it's required; however in a production context be sure to review the official documentation, especially regarding scope and state.

Make it pretty, add the GitHub icon to it - the user presses it and is taken to the following page:

Now, when the green Authorize button is pressed, the user is redirected to Callback URL set during GitHub App creation.

Let's make sure that the server is able to listen to /oauth/github/login/callback. Watch out for this key step: GitHub redirects and adds a query param, a code needed to authenticate the user.

server.get("/oauth/github/login/callback", async (request, reply) => { const { code } = request.query; // ...
});

code is supposed to be exchanged with an access_token, which will be stored in the client and associated with requests to the GitHub REST API.

Now, before moving on, please go back to your GitHub App Configuration page and Generate a new Client Secret. Thus, dotenv it.

const { code } = request.query; const exchangeURL = new URL("login/oauth/access_token", "https://github.com");
exchangeURL.searchParams.set("client_id", process.env.CLIENT_ID);
exchangeURL.searchParams.set("client_secret", process.env.CLIENT_SECRET);
exchangeURL.searchParams.set("code", code); const response = await axios.post(exchangeURL.toString(), null, { headers: { Accept: "application/json", },
}); const { access_token } = response.data;

For the sake of brevity, the example does not report error handling. It is left to the common sense of the reader.

Thus, the token is delivered to the client whom ultimately is redirected to some /new route. But - here's the hero of our story - also receives the access_token as query param.

const { access_token } = response.data; const redirectionURL = new URL("new", "http://localhost:3000");
redirectionURL.searchParams.set("access_token", access_token); reply.status(302).header("Location", redirectionURL).send();

Extract it on the client:

<!-- new.html, sent when GET /new -->
<script> const access_token = new URL(window.location).searchParams.get( "access_token" ); localStorage.setItem("access_token", access_token);
</script>

You can store it any Web Storage, in-memory, really depends on how your interface is to be used. Although an HttpOnly and Secure cookie would help mitigate XSS attacks.

The client of the authenticated user can finally associate the access_token when it legitimately queries the GitHub REST API. Almost there.

Enhancement: popup instead of redirection

Usually other OAuth in the wild do not hard redirect the current page. Suppose to be working on a SPA, think how sad it is to find out that this flow empties your in-memory store. Easy to solve, the redirection will still happen but in a spawned popup (post) that, before dissolving will pass the access_token back to main tab.

Query the GitHub REST API

The data we need is returned from two endpoints.

  1. /user/installations
  2. /user/installations/{installation_id}/repositories

The latter is called with information received from the former.

The documentation states:

You must use a user-to-server OAuth access token, created for a user who has authorized your GitHub App, to access this endpoint.

The access_token returned by a "simple" OAuth App is not valid for these endpoints. However, there's a way to make it work using an OAuth and three other different endpoints. This is shown in the second post.

const githubAPI = axios.create({ baseURL: "https://api.github.com", headers: { Accept: "application/vnd.github.v3+json", },
}); const authorizationConf = { headers: { authorization: `token ${access_token}`, },
}; (async () => { const installationResponse = await githubAPI.get( "user/installations", authorizationConf );
})();

Setting to application/vnd.github.v3+json is recommended by the official docs. It's the GitHub API custom media type.

We receive back a list containing... wait, it's empty. That's because the GitHub App has not yet been installed anywhere.

Let's make it easy to install:

<a href="https://github.com/apps/<github-app-name>/installations/new"
> Change permissions
</a>

That once is clicked shows the following screen:

Either pick you personal account or one of your organizations. Or both. Install it somewhere.

Now /user/installations returns a list of installations. One for each account (personal account || organization) that has at least one repo with the github app installed in it.

Each item has the property id. That's the installation_id required for the next endpoint.

const promises = installationsResponse.data.installations.map( (installation) => { return githubAPI.get( `user/installations/${installation.id}/repositories`, authorizationConf ); }
); // parallel
const responses = await axios.all(promises); const repositories = responses.map((response) => { return response.data.repositories;
});

And there you have all the repositories of the authenticated user or one of his organizations that have the GitHub App installed.

Epilogue

To recap, you now can:

  • Authenticate users via GitHub OAuth authentication
  • Redirect users to install your GitHub App
  • Show them a dropdown containing all the organization in addition the the personal account
  • Know which repositories to show

I'll leave it up to you all the fun of implementing the UI with your favorite framework. If you need to look at the full tour, in the companion repo I used technologies that anyone knows.

Related Posts

Will be released in the next few days

  • GitHub App and OAuth ~ Disjointed flow

  • OAuth popup Guide

  • cover image

Contacts
item.author: didof

item.title: 在 Ubuntu 中安装 SQL Server | Install SQL Server in Ubuntu
item.description:
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何在 Ubuntu 上安装它。

先决条件

  • 具有 sudo 权限的帐户 ## 程序：步骤 1：打开终端使用快捷键 Ctrl + alt + t 打开终端步骤 2：导入公共存储库 GPG 密钥
wget -qO- https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | sudo apt-key add -


步骤 3：为 SQL Server 2019 注册 Microsoft SQL Server Ubuntu 存储库：

 sudo add-apt-repository "$(wget -qO- https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/20.04/mssql-server-2019.list)"


第 4 步：安装 SQL Server

 sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y mssql-server


第 5 步：按照提示选择您的版本，接受许可条款并设置 SA 密码。

 sudo /opt/mssql/bin/mssql-conf setup


第 6 步：验证服务是否正在运行

systemctl status mssql-server --no-pager

下一步：

安装 SQL Server 命令行工具



原文:

Microsoft SQL Server is one of the most prominent databases in the industry today. In this post, I will show you how to install it on Ubuntu.

Prerequisites

  • Account with sudo privileges ## Procedure: Step 1: Open terminal Use the shortcut Ctrl + alt + t to open the terminal Step 2: Import the public repository GPG keys 
wget -qO- https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | sudo apt-key add -


Step 3: Register the Microsoft SQL Server Ubuntu repository for SQL Server 2019:

sudo add-apt-repository "$(wget -qO- https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/20.04/mssql-server-2019.list)"


Step 4: Install SQL Server

sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y mssql-server


Step 5: Follow the prompts to choose your edition, accept license terms and set the SA password.

sudo /opt/mssql/bin/mssql-conf setup


Step 6: Verify that the service is running

systemctl status mssql-server --no-pager

Next Step:

Install SQL Server command-line tools
item.author: seffu

item.title: 本月 Chrome 扩展程序 - 四月 | Chrome Extensions of the Month - April
item.description:
在本文中，我们将介绍一些需要安装以提高生产力的最佳扩展。 因此，无需进一步说明，让我们开始吧。

目录

轻松从网络上获取代码示例，然后无需思考即可访问您的代码示例。

对于使用表单的开发人员和测试人员来说，这种提高生产力的扩展是必须的，因为它消除了在字段中手动输入值的需要。

扩展性让您可以管理您的扩展。 您只需单击一下即可打开/关闭扩展程序。 让您的浏览器保持精简和快速。 您可以一键关闭所有扩展程序。 它允许您始终启用最重要的扩展。

从 +400 个来源收集您喜爱的所有内容。

此扩展程序从鼠标指针向上/向下和向左/向右测量尺寸，直到它碰到边框。 因此，如果您想测量网站上元素之间的距离，这是完美的。 它不适用于图像，因为颜色在像素之间变化很大。

免费且无限制地跟踪 Gmail。 代码折叠 - 选择性地隐藏和显示代码部分的能力 - 在许多文本编辑器和 IDE 中是一项非常宝贵的功能。 现在，开发人员可以利用相同样式的代码折叠，同时在 GitHub 上研究 Web 上的源代码。 适用于任何类型的缩进、空格或制表符。

有时我在浏览器中有滚动条。 这就是这个扩展发挥作用的地方。 此扩展允许您隐藏任何页面上的滚动条，同时仍允许您使用滚动功能。 它有助于为任何网页提供最小的样式。

它从几乎所有网站中删除 cookie 警告。 在大多数情况下，它只是阻止或隐藏 cookie 相关的弹出窗口。 当网站需要正常运行时，它会自动为您接受 cookie 政策（有时它会接受所有，有时只接受必要的 cookie 类别，这取决于更容易做的事情）。 它不会删除 cookie。

将 GitHub 文件浏览器上的文件/文件夹图标替换为代表文件类型和所使用工具的图标。
将 GitHub 的默认图标替换为 Visual Studio Code 的 Material Icon Theme 图标中的图标。 在您的代码编辑器和 github.com 上使用相同的图标，快速识别文件类型、配置文件和项目脚手架。

包起来

这些是本月（四月）的一些延期。 你以前可能有过一些，但如果你喜欢任何人，请不要忘记按❤️。 这将是每个月的完整系列，敬请期待。 我个人使用了上述所有扩展，根据我的经验，每个扩展都值得安装。

你可能感兴趣



原文:

In this article, we are going to look at some of the best extensions that you need to install for better productivity. So without further due, let's get into it.

Table of Contents

1. Grepper

The Grepper is the ultimate RAM upgrade for the software developer's brain. Easily snag code examples from around the web, then access your code examples without having to think.

2. Fake Filler

Fake Filler is the form filler to fill all input fields on a page with randomly generated fake data. This productivity boosting extension is a must for developers and testers who work with forms as it eliminates the need for manually entering values in fields.

3. Extensity

Extensity lets you manage your extension. You can turn on/off an extension with just one click. Keep your browser lean and fast. You can turn off all extensions with just one click. It allows your most important extensions to be always enabled.

4. daily.dev

daily.dev is the fastest growing online community for developers to stay updated on the best developer news. Get all the content you love in one place collected from +400 sources.

5. Dimensions

This extension measures the dimensions from your mouse pointer up/down and left/right until it hits a border. So if you want to measure distances between elements on a website this is perfect. It doesn't really work with images because there the colors change a lot pixel to pixel.

6. Email Tracker for Gmail - Mailtrack

Free and unlimited tracking for Gmail. Mailtrack is a personal email marketing tool with Campaigns, Mail Merge and PDF document tracking from Gmail.

7. GitHub Code Folding

Code folding - the ability to selectively hide and display sections of a code - is an invaluable feature in many text editors and IDEs. Now, developers can utilize that same style code-folding while poring over source code on the web in GitHub. Works for any type of indentation, spaces or tabs.

8. Hide Scrollbar

Sometimes I have the scrollbar in the browser. That's where this extension comes into play. This extension allows you to hide the scrollbars on any page while still allowing you to use the scroll functionality. It helps provide a minimal style for any webpage.

9. I don't care about cookies

It removes cookie warnings from almost all websites. In most cases, it just blocks or hides cookie related pop-ups. When it's needed for the website to work properly, it will automatically accept the cookie policy for you (sometimes it will accept all and sometimes only necessary cookie categories, depending on what's easier to do). It doesn't delete cookies.

10. Material Icons for GitHub

Replace the file/folder icons on the GitHub file browser with icons representing the file's type and which tool it is used by.
Replace GitHub's default icons with icons from Visual Studio Code's Material Icon Theme icons. Use the same icons on your code editor and on github.com, and quickly identify file types, configuration files and project scaffolding at a glance.

Wrapping Up

These were some extensions for this month (April). You might have some before, but if you like anyone then don't forget to press ❤️. This is going to be a full series every month for that stay tuned. I have personally used all the above extensions and from my experience, every extension is worth installing.

You might be interested in
item.author: j471n

item.title: Stack Overflow 上我最喜欢的 JS 挑战之一 | One of my favorite JS challenges on Stack Overflow
item.description:
我喜欢发现不常见的问题并有时间尝试解决它们。

在 Stack Overflow 上活跃了一年零四个月并回答了近 300 个问题后，这是我最喜欢的挑战之一。

问题

如何在不使用后端的情况下为所有用户随机更改一个元素？

好吧，老实说，问题并不完全是这样，用户并没有放弃使用后端，但它只是让它变得更有趣。

我是怎么解决的？

我第一次阅读这个问题时，我认为没有后端是不可能的。

但经过一段时间的思考，我意识到解开这个谜团的关键在于new Date().getTime()提供的值，因为它返回的数字在世界各地的所有计算机上都是相同的，并且是唯一的！

您可以在此处查看 ⚙️ 工作片段

代码说明

第一件事先..

我检索自 1970 年 1 月 1 日以来的毫秒数，然后将其转换为小时数：

 const hours = Math . round ( new Date (). getTime () / ( 1000 * 60 * 60 ))

将hours六位数切成三个数字并将它们添加到数组中。

我创建这个数组的目的是让多个唯一数字根据时间创建一个随机数，这在所有计算机上都是相同的。

 const numbers = [ Number ( hours . toString (). slice ( 0 , 2 )), Number ( hours . toString (). slice ( 2 , 4 )), Number ( hours . toString (). slice ( 4 , 6 )) ]

现在，我需要根据代码生成的随机数显示图像。 我从Lorem Picsum获得一些 URL 并将它们添加到数组中：

 images = [ ' https://picsum.photos/id/237/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/236/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/235/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/234/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/233/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/232/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/231/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/230/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/229/200/300 ' , ' https://picsum.photos/id/228/200/300 ' ];

好的，是时候创建按小时返回随机数的函数了。

那么我们该怎么做呢？

我会一步一步地告诉你..

在hourlyRand()内部，我构建的第一件事是一个箭头函数，它将根据传递给它的numbersArr （数字数组）将伪随机数作为字符串返回。

现在这没有多大意义😵‍💫，但它会在路上几行。

 function hourlyRand (){ const pseudoRandString = ( numbersArr ) => { let rand = 1 numbersArr . forEach (( n , i ) => { if ( n !== 0 ) rand = rand * n }) return rand . toString () } }

现在使用pseudoRandString(numbersArr)函数，我像这样传递在顶部初始化的numbers数组pseudoRandString(numbers)并将值分配给randString变量：

 let randString = pseudoRandString ( numbers )

通过切片randString我可以得到一个两位数。 但是这些数字有一个 typeof string ，所以我需要转换回Number并将值分配给n ：

 // length of the pseudo random number string let L = randString . length let n = Number ( randString . slice ( L - 3 , L - 1 ))

并且函数hourlyRand()几乎准备好了。 唯一悬而未决的是重新调整n

完成的函数hourlyRand()看起来像这样：

 function hourlyRand (){ const pseudoRandString = ( numbersArr ) => { let rand = 1 numbersArr . forEach (( n , i ) => { if ( n !== 0 ) rand = rand * n }) return rand . toString () } // get a pseudo random number and convert to string let randString = pseudoRandString ( numbers ) // length of the pseudo random number string let L = randString . length // slice the string and convert to number let n = Number ( randString . slice ( L - 3 , L - 1 )) // return the double digit hourly random number return n }

现在我们已经拥有了我们需要的一切，我们从hourlyRand()获得两位随机数并除以 10（因为我们有 10 张图像）并将其四舍五入：

 // pseudo-random number between 0 and 9 let n = Math . round ( hourlyRand () / 10 )

最后要显示每小时随机图像，只需添加n作为图像数组的索引：

 const element = document . getElementById ( ' root ' ) element . innerHTML = ' <img src= ' + images [ n ] + ' /> '


原文:

This one got me hooked for hours. I love when I find uncommon questions and have the time to attempt to solve them.

After one year and four months of been active on Stack Overflow and having answered almost 300 questions, this one is one of my favorite challenges.

The question

How does one randomly change an element across the board for all users without using a back-end ?

Well, to be honest the question was not exactly like that, the user wasn't discarding the use of a back-end but it just made it more interesting.

How did I solve it?

The first time I read the question I thought it was not possible without a back-end.

But after some time thinking I realized that the key to unlock this mistery was in the value that new Date().getTime() provides, due to the fact that returns a number that is the same across all computers around the world and is unique!

You can see the ⚙️ working snippet here

Code explanation

First things first..

I retrieve the milliseconds since January 1, 1970 and then I convert it to hours:

const hours = Math.round(new Date().getTime()/(1000*60*60))

Slice hours six digit number into three numbers and add them inside an array.

I'm creating this array with the purpose of having multiple unique numbers to create a random number depending on the time, which will be the same across all computers.

const numbers = [ Number(hours.toString().slice(0,2)), Number(hours.toString().slice(2,4)), Number(hours.toString().slice(4,6))
]

Now, I need images to display, depending on the random number that the code will generate. I get some URLs from Lorem Picsum and add them inside an array:

images = [ 'https://picsum.photos/id/237/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/236/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/235/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/234/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/233/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/232/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/231/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/230/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/229/200/300', 'https://picsum.photos/id/228/200/300' ];

Okay, is time to create the function that will return a random number by the hour.

So how do we do it ?

I'll show you step by step..

Inside hourlyRand() the first thing I build is an arrow function that will return a pseudo random number as a string depending on the numbersArr (array of numbers) passed to it.

This does not make much sense now 😵‍💫 but it will a few lines down the road.

function hourlyRand(){ const pseudoRandString = (numbersArr) => { let rand = 1 numbersArr.forEach((n, i) => { if(n !== 0) rand = rand * n }) return rand.toString() } }

Now using pseudoRandString(numbersArr) function I pass the numbers array initialized at the top like so pseudoRandString(numbers) and I assign the value to randString variable:

 let randString = pseudoRandString(numbers)

By slicing the randString I can get a two digit number. But these numbers have a typeof string so I need to convert back to Number and assign the value to n:

 // length of the pseudo random number string let L = randString.length let n = Number(randString.slice(L-3,L-1))

And the function hourlyRand() is almost ready. The only thing pending is to retun n

The finished function hourlyRand() looks like so:

function hourlyRand(){ const pseudoRandString = (numbersArr) => { let rand = 1 numbersArr.forEach((n, i) => { if(n !== 0) rand = rand * n }) return rand.toString() } // get a pseudo random number and convert to string let randString = pseudoRandString(numbers) // length of the pseudo random number string let L = randString.length // slice the string and convert to number let n = Number(randString.slice(L-3,L-1)) // return the double digit hourly random number return n
}

Now that we have all we need, we get the two digit random number from hourlyRand() and divided by 10 (because we have 10 images) and round it:

// pseudo-random number between 0 and 9 
let n = Math.round(hourlyRand()/10)

Finally to display the hourly random image just add n as an index of the images array:

const element = document.getElementById('root')
element.innerHTML = '<img src=' + images[n] + '/>'

item.title: 将您的电子商务网站从 Magento 1 迁移到 Magento 2 的步骤 | Steps To Migrate Your eCommerce Website From Magento 1 To Magento 2
item.description:
毫无疑问，舒适区总是美丽而快乐。 因为您总是在神秘和严峻挑战的领域感到安全！ 这就是 2015 年 Magento 2 为电子商务企业发布时发生的事情。 很少有人对这种变化感到满意，很少有人对其能力持怀疑态度，并认为它是否符合标准？

随着时间的推移，Magento 2 逐渐证明了它的价值，开发人员认识到将电子商务商店迁移到 Magento 2 的重要性。此外，如果您停留在舒适区，即如果您正在寻找创新，您将永远不会创造历史轻松迁移到 Magento 2 变得至关重要。

如今，Magento 2 成为电子商务零售商的新优势，因为它具有与 Magento 1 完全不同的架构并具有无限的新功能。 是什么让它对电子商务Magento 开发公司更有价值？ 嗯，它支持 PHP 7，默认全页缓存，功能比 Magento 1 更​​快。用户友好的结帐程序、无缝索引器和改进的数据库优化使 Magento 2 成为电子商务开发平台的首选。

阅读更多： https ://www.cmarix.com/blog/steps-to-migrate-your-ecommerce-website-from-magento-1-to-magento-2/



原文:

Undoubtedly, comfort zones are always beautiful and happier. As you always feel secure from the realms of mysteries & tough challenges! That what happened in 2015 when Magento 2 was released for eCommerce ventures. The time when Magento 2 and its features were announced, it sent ripples across Magento developers. Few were happy with the change and few were skeptical about its capabilities and thought if it will match the standards or not?

Gradually as the time passed, Magento 2 proved its worth and the developers recognized about the importance of migrating the eCommerce store to Magento 2. Moreover, you will never make history if you stay in your comfort zone, i.e., if you are looking for innovation and ease, migrating to Magento 2, becomes critical.

Magento 2 today becomes the new edge for eCommerce retailers as it has completely different architecture from Magento 1 and has boundless new features. What makes it more worthy for eCommerce Magento Development Company? Well, it supports PHP 7, full-page cache by default and functions faster than Magento 1. The user-friendly checkout procedure, seamless indexers and improved database optimizations take Magento 2 on the top list of eCommerce development platforms.

Read more: https://www.cmarix.com/blog/steps-to-migrate-your-ecommerce-website-from-magento-1-to-magento-2/

    Trên đây là hai loại gạch lát nền giả gỗ 15x90 và 15x80, giá gạch giả gỗ 15x90 và công dụng, ưu điểm của chúng.     原文:

    Gạch Lát Nền Giả Gỗ  hiện nay được phổ biến rộng rãi và được nhiều người lựa chọn sử dụng bởi tính tiện lợi và giá cả hợp lí của chúng. Các loại gạch giả gỗ được ứng dụng công nghệ in KTS hiện đại, giúp việc mô phỏng các đường vân gỗ được hoàn hảo và tự nhiên nhất có thể. Màu sắc loại gạch này rất đa dạng, với tone màu nâu, ghi xám, vàng… của các loại gỗ Bạch Dương, gỗ Óc Chó, gỗ Hương, gỗ Sồi,… Nhờ đó, mang lại được một không gian thẩm mỹ từ nét mộc mạc tự nhiên, đến hiện đại, từ thanh tao đến sang trọng… Thế thì trong bài viết này, chúng tôi sẽ giải đáp Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x90 Giá Bao Nhiêu? Giá Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x90 mới nhất hiện nay. Từ đó, các bạn có thể cân nhắc lựa chọn loại gạch phù hợp dễ dàng hơn.

    1. Thế nào là gạch giả gỗ?

    Gạch lát sàn giả gỗ là một kiểu xu hướng mới trong lĩnh vực trang trí nội thất. Gạch giả gỗ thật chất là loại gạch Porcelain được sử dụng công nghệ in 5D khiến cho các đường vân, màu sắc và các nét sần trên bề mặt gạch trông giống gần như tương đương với gỗ thật. Gạch giả gỗ sẽ có phần bền hơn gỗ thật do ít phải chịu tác động từ các yếu tố như : độ ẩm, thời tiết, hóa chất. Do đó, việc dùng gạch giả gỗ thay thế thế cho gỗ thật là một lựa chọn hợp lý và tiết kiệm.

    Gạch giả gỗ là gì?

    2. Gạch giả gỗ 15×90

    Gạch giả gỗ 15x90 CMC

    Khi đề cập đến dòng gạch giả gỗ 15×90 thì không thể nào bỏ qua được loại gạch giả gỗ 15×90 CMC. Đây là một trong những dòng bán chạy nhất trong tất cả các dòng gạch giả gỗ. Có kích thước vừa phải, không lớn quá cũng bị không nhỏ quá, màu sắc đa dạng và độc đáo, có tính ứng dụng cao, mang lại hiệu quả rất tốt nên dễ dàng được nhiều người ưa chuộng.

    Ưu điểm của gạch lát nền giả gỗ 15×90 

    Cùng với độ phổ biến của gạch giả gỗ 15x90 đó những công dụng và các ưu điểm tuyệt vời của nó:

    Màu sắc của gạch 15x90 khá đa dạng

    • Đa dạng về màu sắc: gần như có tất cả từ tông sáng cho đến tông trầm và cuối cùng là tông lạnh. Các tông màu sáng đem lại một cảm giác tươi trẻ, mới mẽ, sẽ phù hợp với những nơi có không gian hơi hẹp hoặc thiếu sáng, nó rất dễ phối hợp với hầu hết các màu sắc khác. Bên cạnh đó thì tông trầm sẽ phù hợp với ngôi nhà có không gian tầm trung, có nơi đón được ánh sáng tự nhiên và đối với những người muốn ngôi nhà của mình có không khí ấm cúng hơn, gần gũi với thiên nhiên xanh mát. Tông lạnh nghe sẽ có hơi cứng và không tươi sáng cho lắm nhưng khi phối hợp thành một tổng thể sẽ cho ta cảm giác sang trọng, kiêu sa và hiện đại cũng không kém so với 2 tông màu còn lại.

    • Chịu được lực tốt, tính chống thấm nước cao, bề mặt mờ mịn chống trơn trượt và có thể dễ dàng lau chùi, vệ sinh giống hệt gỗ “hàng thật giá thật”.

    • Có tính ứng dụng cao: Gạch giả gỗ 15×90 CMC có thể vừa sử dụng để lót sàn lẫn ốp tường, phù hợp với nhiều kiểu không gian khác nhau như phòng khách, nhà bếp, phòng ngủ, phòng đọc sách, hoặc còn có thể dùng để lót sân.

    • Có nhiều cách để gia công và thiết kế, mang đến một không gian đa chiều, độc đáo, đặc sắc: lót thẳng, lót theo kiểu xương cá, lót xen kẽ, ……

    •  Có nhiều nhãn hàng sản xuất để lựa chọn: Đồng Tâm, Bạch Mã, Viglacera, Đồng Tâm, Taicera, Prime, Kis,Hoàng Gia, Vincera, Vicenza, Viglacera,….

    Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x90 Giá Bao Nhiêu? Giá Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x90 mới nhất hiện nay

    Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x90 Giá Bao Nhiêu là thắc mắc của nhiều khách hàng hiện tại. Dòng gạch giả gỗ 15×90 CMC thường có giá rơi vào tầm khoảng 185.000 VNĐ. Những kích thước lớn hơn thì giá của nó sẽ càng tăng thêm. Tùy thuộc vào nhu cầu của khách hàng và giới hạn tài chính của mỗi gia đình.

    ➡️➡️➡️ Tham khảo thêm các mẫu Gạch Lát Nền Nhà Giả Gỗ đẹp nhất hiện nay

    3. Gạch giả gỗ 15x80

    Gạch giả gỗ 15×80 là loại gạch giả gỗ rất được ưa chuộng hiện nay. Loại này có họa tiết vân gỗ trông rất giống thực và sống động không khác gì gỗ tự nhiên. Ngoài ra, với kích thước 15×80 của gạch  rất sẽ dễ dàng trong việc ứng dụng, ốp tường hay lát nền đều có thể.

     

    Những vân gỗ sống động

    Các ưu điểm của gạch lát nền giả gỗ 15x80

    • Chịu lực tốt, độ bền cao, kích cỡ chuẩn, dễ dàng thi công.

    • Vẫn chống thấm tốt trong khoảng thời gian dài sử dụng.

    • Với công nghệ in 5D làm cho mức độ ngẫu nhiên của các vân gạch giả gỗ giống như với gỗ thật.

    • Bề mặt đa dạng : Matt (Mờ),  Polished (bóng),  Lappato (Bán bóng) và Structure (Nhám), nên được dùng cả trong việc lót sàn hoặc ốp tường.

    •  Phù hợp với hầu hết các phong cách thiết kế khác nhau như hiện đại, Cổ điển, Tây Âu.

    Thiết kế gạch lát nền vân gỗ hiện đại, sang trọng

    Các kiểu lót gạch

    Với mẫu gạch này, ta có thể áp dụng được nhiều ý tưởng thiết kế độc đáo. Thay vì chỉ lát gạch nối tiếp ngay hàng như cách thông thường, bạn có thể lát gạch theo các kiểu mới lạ như so le, hoặc kiểu ziczac, kiểu xương cá… Các kiểu lát gạch này có thể tạo tính thẩm mỹ, đồng thời thể hiện được nét cá tính của các người thiết kế. 

    • Lát so-le: Bạn có thể thử lát 2 hàng gạch so le với nhau. Như vậy sẽ góp phần tạo thêm điểm nhấn cho căn phòng. Đây là một trong những cách ốp phổ biến nhất hiện nay với thiết kế giống hệt gỗ lát sàn công nghiệp và gỗ tự nhiên. Cách ốp so le này sẽ hợp với thiết kế đơn giản, nhẹ nhàng của phòng khách. Hoặc cũng có thể dùng để lót sàn phòng ngủ, để giúp tạo nên nét đẹp độc đáo – ấn tượng hơn cho căn phòng. Cách ốp so le lùi dần xuống cũng là một kiểu lát so le giúp tạo nên nét phá cách cho không gian.

    • Lát theo kiểu zic zắc: Để tăng thêm nét ấn tượng và đặc sắc, bạn có thể thiết kế kiểu lót gạch giả gỗ 15×80 theo kiểu ziczac. Có thể sử dụng 2 mẫu gạch với tông màu hoàn toàn đối nghịch nhau và lát ziczac để tăng thêm điểm nhấn cho căn phòng của bạn. Tuy nhiên thì kiểu thiết kế này đòi hỏi yêu cầu thi công khá phức tạp và khắt khe nên bạn cần lưu ý về khả năng thi công trước khi quyết định lựa chọn.

    • Cách lát gạch giả gỗ theo kiểu xương cá: Phương pháp lát gạch giả gỗ theo hình xương cá cũng là một trong những kiểu lát gạch gây ấn tượng độc đáo không kém cạnh. Bạn có thể đặt 2 mẫu gạch gối đầu vào nhau để tạo nên vẻ đặc sắc. Hoặc cũng có thể lát 2 mẫu gạch tựa vào nhau theo một đường thẳng ở giữa. Kiểu lát gạch xương cá này thường sẽ lấy điểm trung tâm làm đường thẳng tạo nên sự mới lạ.

    Lát gạch giả gỗ kiểu xương cá

    Giá gạch giả gỗ 15x80 là bao nhiêu?

    Chắc chắn mọi khách hàng đều quan tâm đến vấn đề Giá Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x80 này. Hiện nay trên thị trường, mức giá thành của dòng sản phẩm gạch này sẽ chịu ảnh hưởng của nhiều yếu tố. Các yếu tố sẽ bao gồm: thương hiệu sản xuất, chất liệu gạch (porcelain, granite hay ceramic,…), địa chỉ phân phối, gạch nội địa hoặc gạch nhập khẩu,… Dưới đây là bảng giá chung của loại gạch giả gỗ 15x80 để bạn có thể tham khảo:

    • Gạch lát nền giả gỗ 15x80 Prime: 320.000 – 370.000 VNĐ/m2.

    • Gạch lát nền giả gỗ Hoàn Mỹ: 310.000 – 350.000 VNĐ/m2.

    • Gạch lát nền giả gỗ Trung Quốc: 220.000 – 280.000 VNĐ/m2.

    4. Lời kết

    Trên đây là hai loại gạch lát nền giả gỗ 15x90 và 15x80, giá gạch giả gỗ 15x90 và công dụng, ưu điểm của chúng. Mong bài viết về Gạch Giả Gỗ 15x90 Giá Bao Nhiêu? của ⏩⏩⏩  Gạch Ốp Lát Hùng Túy đã có thể cung cấp cho bạn đọc đầy đủ những thông tin mà bạn cần biết và có thể giúp bạn chọn được cho mình loại gạch phù hợp với giá cả hợp lý để phục vụ cho nhu cầu trang trí nội thất cho ngôi nhà của mình.
item.author: gachoplatcaocaphungtuy

item.title: PaaS：关于个性化即服务你需要知道的一切 | PaaS: Everything You Need to Know About Personalization as a Service
item.description:
在通过品牌获得个性化购物体验后， 60%的购物者认为他们会成为回头客。

所以，

为您的客户提供个性化体验是确保他们感到受到重视和赞赏的最佳方式 - 并且会回来获得更多。

作为一家企业，您知道个性化是客户满意度和忠诚度的关键。

而且，

据谷歌称， 90%的多台设备所有者在屏幕之间切换以完成任务，平均每天使用三种不同的组合。

很容易说，客户希望能够毫不费力地从一个渠道转移到另一个渠道，而不必重复自己或从头开始。

总而言之，客户希望：

  • 个性化体验
  • 互联的全渠道旅程

如果您没有足够的资源在内部构建全渠道个性化体验，那么实现这一目标的最佳方法之一就是使用个性化即服务。 个性化即服务 (PaaS) 与 SaaS 模型非常相似，它允许企业通过收集有关客户的数据并将其整合到他们的营销和销售工作中来定制他们与客户的交互，而不管渠道如何。

但是，更具体地说，什么是个性化即服务，您如何确保充分发挥它的潜力，有什么好处？

在这篇博文中，我们将讨论您需要了解的有关个性化即服务的所有信息。 我们将概述它是什么，它是如何工作的，以及为什么它对当今的企业如此重要。

什么是个性化即服务

由于客户平均在三个不同的渠道之间切换，并要求品牌提供量身定制的体验，因此提供高水平持续和一致的客户体验的解决方案很简单：个性化的全渠道体验。

作为一家企业，您需要确保您的客户在每个渠道上都能获得个性化的消息、推荐和产品。 客户应该能够从任何来源看到他们正在寻找的东西并期待它，无论是网站、电子邮件还是移动应用程序。

这就是个性化即服务发挥作用的地方：

个性化即服务是一种基于云的软件架构模型，它集成了来自多个来源的内容和客户数据，并提供跨所有渠道的个性化。

换句话说，个性化即服务是一种软件许可模式，它允许使用外部服务器以订阅方式访问软件，从而能够为客户提供个性化的内容和体验，而无需他们手动输入偏好。 它依赖于使用客户数据来通过算法实时个性化内容。 这可用于个性化从产品推荐到动态生成的网页的所有内容。

尽管个性化即服务已经存在了好几年，但由于 DXP 空间、MACH 架构、人工智能和机器学习的进步，它直到最近才受到关注。

个性化即服务的好处

由于个性化即服务工具是基于云的（通常是 API 优先），它们可以与现有系统和技术集成，使其成为寻求全面个性化解决方案的企业的理想选择。

让我们回顾一下定义：

在可组合架构中，系统的不同部分以这样一种方式连接，即可以通过组合现有功能来创建新功能。

这允许对不断变化的业务需求做出更大的灵活性和更快的反应。

由于个性化即服务利用基于云的可组合软件架构，它使企业能够从可组合架构中充分受益。

全渠道策略在企业中越来越受欢迎，因为他们希望提供一致的客户体验，无论使用何种设备或平台。

但提供有效的全渠道策略可能会很棘手，尤其是在您的个性化解决方案不具备此功能的情况下。

这就是个性化即服务的用武之地。

由于个性化即服务是一种可组合的软件架构模型，它集成了来自多个来源的内容和客户数据，因此可以更轻松地跨不同渠道管理和交付内容。

个性化即服务与个性化（客户）服务

尽管个性化即服务和个性化服务是两个不同的概念，但对两者仍然存在混淆。 那么，我们来看看什么是个性化服务。

什么是个性化服务

个性化服务是针对客户的个性化需求量身定制的一种客户服务。 这可以包括从定制产品以适应客户的个人喜好到根据他们的具体情况为他们提供独特的一对一帮助的所有内容。

通过个性化的服务体验，企业能够为客户创造更难忘和愉快的体验，这可以带来回头客和忠诚的客户。

个性化服务可以与大规模生产和大规模营销形成对比，后者为所有客户提供相同的标准化产品和服务。 虽然大规模生产和大规模营销可以高效且具有成本效益，但它们不能提供与个性化服务相同水平的定制和个性化。

因此，个性化服务可以被视为使自己与竞争对手区分开来的一种方式。

为什么个性化服务很重要

根据定义，个性化是定制产品、服务和体验以适应客户的个人需求和偏好的过程。

随着公司努力为其客户创造独特和差异化的体验，个性化在当今的竞争环境中变得更加重要。

无论是最近购买的个人感谢信还是通过电子邮件发送的生日折扣，个性化都可以在客户服务方面发挥重要作用。

个性化服务有很多好处。 首先，个性化可以创造更积极的客户体验，从而提高客户满意度和忠诚度。 此外，个性化可以通过让客户感觉受到重视和赞赏来帮助提高销售和转化率——更有可能继续与公司开展业务。

在企业努力从竞争中脱颖而出的世界中，个性化是一种强大的工具，可以为企业提供成功所需的优势。

您如何个性化服务

近年来，提供​​个性化服务变得越来越重要，因为客户开始期待更加量身定制和个性化的体验。

简而言之，个性化服务意味着给予每位客户应有的关注并满足他们的独特需求。

根据业务和客户群的不同，有多种方法可以个性化服务。 例如，一些企业可能会选择使用客户数据来个性化沟通和服务交付。 其他企业可能会专注于与每个客户建立更私人的关系，例如通过建立融洽关系并在个人层面上了解客户。

个性化服务涉及创建一个让客户感到被重视和被倾听的系统。

关键是找到适合企业和客户的个性化技术的正确组合。

您可以阅读“网站内容个性化创建引人入胜的客户体验的 7 种有效方法”，查看个性化示例以提升您的数字客户体验。

底线

在当今竞争激烈的商业环境中，为客户提供个性化体验比以往任何时候都更加重要。

事实上，个性化已成为跨行业企业最重要的差异化因素之一。

个性化可以采取多种形式，但其核心是了解每个客户的个人需求，并为他们提供满足这些需求的定制体验。

通过个性化客户体验，企业能够与客户建立更牢固的联系。 这种个人联系有助于建立信任和忠诚度，这两者对于长期成功都是必不可少的。

研究表明，个性化可以将采购成本降低多达 50%，将收入提高 5% 到 15%，并将营销支出效率提高 10% 到 30%。 拥有个性化体验的客户也更有可能向他人推荐公司。

鉴于个性化即服务的明显优势，企业越来越多地投资于提供这种服务的方式也就不足为奇了。

简而言之，个性化是提供出色客户体验的关键因素。 没有它，企业将难以在当今竞争激烈的环境中茁壮成长。



原文:

After a personalized shopping experience with a brand, 60% of shoppers think they will become repeat buyers.

Therefore,

Offering a personalized experience for your customers is the best way to ensure that they feel valued and appreciated - and will come back for more.

As a business, you know that personalization is key to customer satisfaction and loyalty.

Moreover,

According to Google, 90% of multiple device owners switch between screens to complete tasks, using an average of three different combinations every day.

It’s easy to say that customers want to be able to move effortlessly from one channel to another without having to repeat themselves or start from scratch.

To sum up, customers want:

  • personalized experiences
  • connected, omnichannel journeys

If you don’t have enough resources to build omnichannel personalization experiences in-house, one of the best ways to achieve this is by using personalization as a service. Personalization as a service (PaaS) is very similar to the SaaS model that allows businesses to tailor their interactions with customers by collecting and incorporating data about them into their marketing and sales efforts regardless of the channel.

But, more specifically, what is personalization as a service, and how can you make sure that you're using it to its full potential, what are the benefits?

In this blog post, we'll discuss everything you need to know about personalization as a service. We'll outline what it is, how it works, and why it's so important for today's businesses.

What Is Personalization as a Service

Since customers are switching between an average of three different channels and demanding tailored experiences from brands, the solution to deliver high-level continuous and consistent customer experiences is straightforward: personalized omnichannel experiences.

As a business, you need to make sure your customers are getting personalized messages, recommendations, and offerings on every channel. The customers should be able to see what they're looking for and expect it from any source, whether that's a website, an email, or a mobile app.

This is where personalization as a service comes into play:

Personalization as a service is a cloud-based software architecture model that integrates content and customer data from multiple sources and provides personalization across all channels.

In other words, personalization as a service is a software licensing model which allows access to software on a subscription basis using external servers that enable a way to provide personalized content and experiences to customers without the need for them to manually input their preferences. It relies on the use of customer data to algorithmically personalize content in real-time. This can be used to personalize everything from product recommendations to dynamically generated web pages.

Although personalization as a service has been around for several years, it has only recently gained traction due to advances in DXP space, MACH architecture, artificial intelligence, and machine learning.

The Benefits of Personalization as a Service

Since personalization as a service tools are cloud-based (and usually API-first), they can be integrated with existing systems and technologies, making them an ideal choice for businesses looking for a comprehensive personalization solution.

- Personalization as a service allows you to benefit from composable architecture.

Let’s recall the definition:

“Personalization as a service is a cloud-based software architecture model that integrates content and customer data from multiple sources and provides personalization across all channels.”

In a composable architecture, the different parts of the system are connected in such a way that new functions can be created by combining existing ones.

This allows for more flexibility and faster reaction to changing business needs.

Since personalization as a service leverages cloud-based, composable software architecture, it allows businesses to fully benefit from composable architecture.

- Personalization as a service supports omnichannel personalization.

Omnichannel strategies are becoming increasingly popular among businesses as they look to provide a consistent customer experience, regardless of the device or platform being used.

But delivering an effective omnichannel strategy can be tricky, especially if your personalization solution isn't equipped for it.

That's where personalization as a service comes in.

Since personalization as a service is a composable software architecture model that integrates content and customer data from multiple sources, it makes it easier to manage and deliver content across different channels.

Personalization as a Service vs. Personalized (Customer) Service

Although personalization as a service and personalized service are two different concepts, there is still confusion about the two. So, let’s take a look at what personalized service is.

What Is Personalized Service

Personalized service is a type of customer service tailored to the customer's individual needs. This can include everything from customizing a product to fit the customer's personal preferences to provide them with unique, one-on-one assistance that is based on their specific situation.

By personalizing the service experience, businesses are able to create a more memorable and enjoyable experience for the customer, which can lead to repeat business and loyal customers.

Personalized service can be contrasted with mass production and mass marketing, which provide standardized products and services that are identical for all customers. While mass production and mass marketing can be efficient and cost-effective, they do not provide the same level of customization and personalization as personalized service.

As a result, personalized service can be seen as a way to differentiate oneself from one's competitors.

Why Is Personalized Service Is Important

By definition, personalization is the process of tailoring products, services, and experiences to fit the individual needs and preferences of a customer.

Personalization has become even more important in today's competitive landscape as companies strive to create unique and differentiated experiences for their customers.

Whether it’s a personal thank-you note for a recent purchase or a birthday discount sent via email, personalization can make all the difference when it comes to customer service.

There are many benefits of personalized services. First and foremost, personalization creates a more positive customer experience, which can lead to greater customer satisfaction and loyalty. In addition, personalization can help to increase sales and conversion rates by making the customer feel valued and appreciated - more likely to continue doing business with the company.

In a world where businesses are striving to stand out from the competition, personalization is a powerful tool that can give businesses the edge they need to succeed.

How Do You Personalize a Service

Delivering personalized service has become increasingly important in recent years, as customers have come to expect a more tailored and individualized experience.

In short, personalized service means giving each customer the attention they deserve and meeting their unique needs.

There are a number of ways to personalize service, depending on the business and the customer base. For example, some businesses may choose to make use of customer data to personalize communication and service delivery. Other businesses may focus on creating a more personal relationship with each customer, such as by building a rapport and getting to know customers on a personal level.

Personalized service involves creating a system where the customer feels valued and heard.

The key is to find the right mix of personalization techniques that work for the business and the customers.

You can read ‘7 Effective Ways of Website Content Personalization to Create Compelling Customer Experiences’ to see personalization examples to level up your digital customer experience.

The Bottom Line

In today's hypercompetitive business environment, it's more important than ever to give customers a personalized experience.

In fact, personalization has become one of the most important differentiators for businesses across industries.

Personalization can take many forms, but at its core, it is about understanding the individual needs of each customer and providing them with a tailored experience that meets those needs.

By personalizing the customer experience, businesses are able to create a stronger connection with their customers. This personal connection helps to build trust and loyalty, both of which are essential for long-term success.

Studies have shown that personalization can lower acquisition costs by up to 50%, improve revenues by 5 to 15%, and enhance marketing spend efficiency by 10 to 30%. And customers who have a personalized experience are also more likely to recommend a company to others.

Given the clear advantages of personalization as a service, it's no wonder that businesses are increasingly investing in ways to deliver it.

In short, personalization is a key ingredient in delivering an outstanding customer experience. Without it, businesses will struggle to thrive in today's competitive environment.
item.author: ninetailed

item.title: React 设计模式：复合组件 | React Design Pattern: Compound Components
item.description:
何塞·惠洛克

发表于实施：

第 1 步：创建上下文

const ModalContext = React.createContext(defaultContext);

第 2 步：创建父组件

const PreviewModal = ({ children }) => { return ( <> <p>Preview Modal like Netflix</p> {children} </> ); };

步骤 3：Connexion des enfants avec le parent

 const { episodes } = useContext(ModalContext);

奖金：

 PreviewModal.Player = Player; PreviewModal.Info = Info; PreviewModal.Episode = Episode;

塞巴斯蒂安·洛伯—— 爱德华·康斯坦丁—— Mar 17 3月17日



原文:

José Wheelock

Posted on Apr 26

Ce design pattern est assez simple à mettre en place: on a un component parent qui a des components enfants et ils sont reliés par un context.

Ce qu'on voit généralement en production, c'est un component parent avec des enfants à qui on passe des props. Ici, l'approche est différente, c'est un component qui est découpé en plusieurs options:


<PreviewModal>
  <PreviewModal.Player />
  <PreviewModal.Info />
  <PreviewModal.Episode />
</PreviewModal>

Dans notre exemple, on a notre component PreviewModal qui mets à disposition plusieurs options : le player, les infos, les épisodes.
Mais ces options font partie uniquement de la previewModal, parce que ils sont fortement liée par un context.

Inplémentation:

Step 1: Création du context


const ModalContext = React.createContext(defaultContext);

Pour l'exemple, j'ai mis en place la forme la plus basique du context, pas de provider value.

Step 2: Création du component parent


const PreviewModal = ({ children }) => {
  return (
    <>
      <p>Preview Modal like Netflix</p>
      {children}
    </>
  );
};

Step 3: Connexion des enfants avec le parent


const { episodes } = useContext(ModalContext);

Bonus:


PreviewModal.Player = Player;
PreviewModal.Info = Info;
PreviewModal.Episode = Episode;

La petite astuce, PreviewModal est un objet js donc on peut lui faire stocker les components.
Je trouve qu'écrire le code de cette manière ça permet de mieux comprendre que la component parents à des "options"

Sebastien Lorber - Apr 20

Eduard Constantin - Mar 17
item.author: wheel0ck

item.title: 全口种植牙适合您吗？ | Are Full Mouth Dental Implants Right for You?
item.description:
牙齿缺失、牙齿破损或腐烂或假牙损坏的人通常适合全口种植牙。 然而，在过去，骨骼不足、某些健康状况或吸烟等可能损害牙龈或颌骨健康的习惯的人不被视为候选人。 今天，诊断和骨骼重建的进步已经使大多数患者可以接受植入物。

woxro technologies - woxro 技术 - Apr 26 4月26日



原文:

People with missing teeth, broken or decayed teeth, or damaged dentures are usually candidates for full mouth dental implants. However, in the past, people with insufficient bone, certain health conditions, or habits like smoking that could compromise the health of their gums or jawbone were not considered candidates. Today, advances in diagnostics and bone reconstruction have made it so that most patients can receive implants.

item.title: 2022 年 React 完整指南 | Complete Guide About React in 2022
item.description:
客户端视图层或用户界面 (UI) 是使用 HTML 代码制作的。 部分使用 React 的重要组织合并了 Whatsapp 和 Instagram。 因此，React 在 2013 年被普遍交付给了人们。

使用 React 的好处

基本的：
通过这种方式，任何具有 JavaScript 经验的工程师都可以快速掌握 React 并开始构建 Web 应用程序。

可重复使用的元素：
可重用性提高了设计师的责任感。 对于可比的应用部分， react 开发公司软件工程师不必做各种内容。 此后，他们可以重用代码。 通过这种方式，代码可重用性有助于降低创建成本。

简单的代码测试：
它包含有助于简单测试和故障排除的本地仪器。 每当您转换应用程序的一部分时，它不会影响其他部分。 因此，React 为测试和调查节省了大量时间。

网站优化友好：
随后，React 页面的跳过速度很低。 此外，React 的部分，例如 React Helmet 和 React Router，有助于构建适应 SEO 的应用程序。

因此，您在 React 中创建的任何应用程序都将使用称为 React 部件的组件构建。 工程师可以使用 React 部件更快地组装 UI。

实用组件

  • 类组件

    • 尽管有这两个部分，React 还包含其他可指导应用程序的比较组件。

    我们应该继续研究 ReactJS 的各个部分。

    实用组件
    实用部分是帮助制作 React 应用程序的JavaScript功能。 有用的部分在实用部分不需要来自其他部分的信息的任何时候都是有用的。 意思是，实际部分不与不同部分交互。

    类组件
    类部分就像有用的部分。 然而，阶级部分比功利部分更令人困惑。 类部分相互协作。 以这种方式，类部分与不同部分交换信息。

    高阶组件
    高阶组件 (HOC) 将部件确认为信息并将部件作为结果返回，但具有额外的用处。 低能组件
    低能部件也被称为无状态有用部件，因为它需要一些 PC 资产来交付，如内存、CPU 和 GPU。

    精明的组件
    任何跟上其状态的类部分都称为精明部分。 精明的零件与分类零件的工作方式大致相同。 当我们使用 Babel 或 ES6 风格的 React 时，我们将其理解为任何扩展部分的类对象。

    表示组件
    展示部分也称为无状态实用部分，它获取道具并提供 UI。 没有状态的普通 JavaScript 容量也称为无状态容量。 展示部分是从更高请求部分获得状态的部分。 表现部分主要担心事物的表现方式，而不是国家的管理。

    支架组件
    持有人部分是一种将信息和行为传递给其他隔间部分的类部分。 此外，隔间恢复信息并随后创建适用的子部分。 以这种方式，隔间部件以工作环境为中心。



    原文:

    React is an open-source JavaScript library that is valuable in building web application interfaces. React or rather ReactJS helps in building a more grounded structure for its items by reusing parts. There are two-sections in ReactJS - HTML code and HTML archive. The client view layer or the User Interface (UI) is fabricated utilizing HTML code. The HTML page contains the parts as a whole.

    Jordan Walke, a Facebook programmer, made React. React was made in the year 2011. In any case, React was at first utilized for Facebook. React library is useful in creating sites and applications. A portion of the significant organizations that have utilized React incorporate Whatsapp and Instagram. Consequently, React was delivered to people in general in 2013.

    Benefits of Using React

    Basic:
    React is impressively easier to comprehend and apply. In this manner, any engineer with JavaScript experience can rapidly get a handle on React and start building web applications.

    Reusable Elements:
    One of the fundamental benefits of React is code reusability. Reusability improves on the responsibility of designers. For comparable application parts, react development company software engineers don't have to make various contents. Henceforth, they can reuse the code. In this way, code reusability assists with decreasing creation costs.

    Simple Code Testing:
    One more essential element of React is trying. It contains local instruments which help in simple testing and troubleshooting. ReactJS part based engineering decreases the requirement for broad investigating. Whenever you transform one part of the application, it doesn't influence the others. Therefore, React saves a ton of time for testing and investigating.

    Website optimization Friendly:
    ReactJS takes into consideration faster site page age. The page stacking time for React applications is a lot of lower than the others. Subsequently, the skip pace of React pages is low. Moreover, the parts of React, for example React Helmet and React Router, assists with building SEO-accommodating applications.

    How Do React Components Aid in Web Application Development?

    A React part is one of the center components of React application. As such, any application you make in React will be constructed utilizing components known as React parts. The engineer can assemble the UI quicker utilizing React parts.

    React parts are of two sorts:

    • Utilitarian Components
    • Class Components

    Notwithstanding these two parts, React contains other comparative components that guide in fostering the application.

    We should continue on toward the various parts of ReactJS.

    Parts of ReactJS

    Utilitarian Components
    Utilitarian parts are JavaScript capacities that assistance in making React applications. The useful parts are useful at whatever point the utilitarian part doesn't need the information from some other parts. Meaning, practical parts don't interface with different parts.

    Class Components
    Class parts are like useful parts. Yet, class parts are more perplexing than utilitarian parts. Class parts collaborate with one another. In this manner, class parts trade information with different parts.

    Higher-Order Components
    The Higher-Order Components (HOC) acknowledge a part as info and return the part as result, yet with extra usefulness. HOC in React is a standard progressed React worldview for sending reusable rationale and usefulness across React parts.

    Imbecilic Components
    Imbecilic parts are otherwise called stateless useful parts since it requires a couple of PC assets to deliver like memory, CPU, and GPU.

    Savvy Components
    Any class part that keeps up with its state is otherwise called a savvy part. Savvy parts work much the same way to class parts. At the point when we work with Babel or ES6-style React, we realize it as any class object that broadens parts.

    Presentational Components
    The show part is otherwise called a stateless practical part that takes props and delivers UI. Plain JavaScript capacities that don't have states are otherwise called stateless capacities. Presentational parts are the parts that get state from the higher-request part. UI is restrictively delivered in light of state, which is given to them as a boundary. The presentational part is chiefly worried about how things are shown more than the administration of the state.

    Holder Components
    A holder part is a kind of class part that conveys information and conduct to other compartment parts. Also, the compartment recovers information and afterward creates the applicable sub-part. In this manner, compartment parts center around working circumstances.
