item.title: 使用 FinOps Foundation 的最佳实践在 AWS 上进行使用情况+支出预测 | Usage+Spend Forecasting on AWS with FinOps Foundation’s Best Practices
item.description:
预测是根据我们对驱动感兴趣数据的因素及其过去和现在的实际值的假设进行预测的过程。 拥有准确预测的关键价值在于它们允许主动而不是被动。

十二分之一的受访者表示，他们的云支出预计将超出预算 40% 以上。
做出错误的预测或没有预测会给您的公司带来高昂的成本。 许多人想知道预测是否是个好主意。 根据我们的经验，答案是肯定的。 虽然没有人拥有水晶球，但对话式预测模型可以防止疯狂猜测造成的损害，如果你没有建立一个好的模型，你的团队仍然会隐含地做出不管他们认为预测是一个坏主意或看某人的看法别人的模型。 没有关于这个的讨论，我们看到它发生在大小公司。

在 AWS 环境中，我们建议预测使用情况和支出

  1. 例如，准确的使用预测允许
  2. 购买正确数量的预留实例/储蓄计划
  3. 准确判断 EC2 / RDS 实例类型以及是否改用 serverless

  4. 准确设置 AWS 服务参数

  5. 例如，准确的成本预测允许

  6. 制定切合实际的预算，从而更好地分配资源——例如时间、金钱、招聘等。

  7. 帮助解决方案定价

  8. 在给定预期收入的情况下确定具有成本效益的技术。

Read the rest of the article at jiripik.com . 在 jiripik.com 阅读文章的其余部分。

Tomasz Kowalewski - Tomasz Kowalewski - Mar 21 3月21日



原文:

Forecasting is the process of making predictions based on our assumptions about the factors driving the data of interest and its actual past and present values. The key value of having accurate forecasts is that they allow to be proactive, rather than reactive.

In 2020, for one in three respondents, cloud spend was projected to be over budget by between 20 percent and 40 percent. One in 12 respondents said their cloud spend was expected to be over budget by more than 40 percent.
– Pepperdata

Making wrong or no forecasts has a high cost for your Company. Many have wondered if it’s a good idea to forecast at all. In our experience, the answer is yes. While nobody owns a crystal ball, a conversative forecasting model prevents the damage from wild guesses, that, if you don’t build a good model, your team will still implicitly make irrespective on their opinion that forecasts were a bad idea or look at someone else’s model. There is no discussion about this, we saw it happen in small and large Companies.

In the AWS context, we recommend forecasting both usage and spend

  1. accurate usage forecasts allow, for example,
  2. to purchase the right number of reserved instances / savings plans
  3. to accurately decide the EC2 / RDS instance type and whether to use serverless instead

  4. to accurately set up AWS services parameters

  5. accurate cost forecasts allow, for example,

  6. to create realistic budgets and thus better allocate resources – such as time, money, hiring etc.

  7. to help with the solution pricing

  8. to determine the cost-effective technology given the expected revenue.

Read the rest of the article at jiripik.com.

Tomasz Kowalewski - Mar 21
item.author: jiripik

item.title: 在 Blogger 上设置 Sees 符合 GDPR 的 Cookie 同意横幅 | Setup Seers GDPR Compliant Cookie Consent Banner on Blogger
item.description:
要在您的网站上正确集成 Seers CMP 并手动标记 cookie 设置脚本，请遵循以下过程：

第1步：
登录/注册到Seers并转到Seers 仪表板

第2步：
单击Cookie 同意并添加域以扫描必要和不必要的 cookie。 扫描您的网站可能需要几分钟时间。

第 3 步：
扫描后，点击设置图标并选择：

  1. 一个标准：一键设置手动集成
  2. 自定义：高级设置

选择手动集成并复制横幅脚本：
第4步：
在您的 Blogger 网站上以管理员身份登录。

第 5 步：

  1. 单击网站左侧显示的功能区中的“主题”按钮。
  2. 单击出现在窗口右上角的三个点。

新的下拉菜单将打开。

  1. 单击“编辑 HTML”选项。

第 6 步：
在下一个窗口中，将您的脚本粘贴到此处：

  1. 您的键被突出显示。
  2. 点击保存按钮。

第 7 步：
它将带您到下一页

Seers GDPR Cookie Consent will successfully be integrated on Blogger Seers GDPR Cookie Consent将成功集成到 Blogger



原文:

To integrate Seers CMP properly on your website and manually markup cookie-setting scripts, follow the process below:

Step 1:
Login/Signup to Seers & Go to Seers Dashboard

Step 2:
Click on Cookie Consent and Add Domain for Scanning necessary and unnecessary cookies. It might take several minutes to scan your website.

Step 3:
After scanning, Click on Settings icon and Select:

  1. One Standard: One Click Setup for Manual Integration
  2. Customized: Advanced Settings

Select Manual Integration and Copy the Banner Script:
(Note: Script has a Unique ID)

<script data-key="xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" data-name="CookieXray" src="https://cdn.seersco.com/banners/22768/17303/cb.js" type="text/javascript"></script>

Step 4:
Log in as administrator on your Blogger website.

Step 5:

  1. Click "Theme" button in ribbon appearing on left side of website.
  2. Click on three dots appearing in right corner of window.

New drop-down menu will open.

  1. Click on "Edit HTML" option.

Step 6:
In next window, Paste your script Here:

  1. Your key is highlighted.
  2. Click on save button.

Step 7:
It will take you to next page

Seers GDPR Cookie Consent will successfully be integrated on Blogger

item.title: 麦哲伦地图更新问题的故障排除步骤–Gpsmapzz | Troubleshooting Steps for Magellan Map Updates issues –Gpsmapzz
item.description:
佳明GPS

发表于它是一个 GPS 应用程序，通过使用全球定位来跟踪您的实时位置，使用户能够通过宽显示的免费终身地图查看其所有航路点。 如果更新您的 Magellan GPS 设备，可以确保设备更快、性能更好。 当您更新您的麦哲伦地图时，您会遇到很多问题。 尝试下载 Magellan GPS 更新时会产生各种问题。 有些问题很快得到解决，有些问题需要技术支持解决。

此博客提供简单的故障排除步骤，以指导所有用户解决 Magellan GPS 更新问题。

麦哲伦 GPS 追踪器：

麦哲伦 GPS 追踪器是用于追踪您的行踪的最快、最便携的设备。 它还准确地提供了准确的位置。 它用于绘制钓鱼热点地图，以及绘制路线和水域图。 它还表明，与内置的压敏气压计相比，它是一款真正的跟踪绘图仪和更高的精度。

修复 Magellan GPS 未更新的步骤：

以下是一些解决 GPS 不更新问题的解决方案。 这些要点有助于解决您的解决方案问题。

  1. 将您的设备连接到互联网。

  2. 重新启动您的设备。

  3. 重置并为您的设备充电。

  4. 再次更新您的设备。

确保在获得最新的 Magellan GPS 更新时，将您的设备连接到正确的互联网。 否则，如果您遇到很多问题，请检查您的互联网速度在线工具。 如果您的网速变慢，请按照以下步骤操作：

在这种情况下，您会尽快重新启动设备。

重新启动是解决这些问题的最佳解决方案。 重新启动设备时，请确保断开互联网连接，然后重新启动设备，然后在半小时后再次打开设备。 之后，您可以再次将其连接到互联网。

重置您的 Magellan GPS 设备。

换句话说，在您尝试首先更新 Magellan GPS 之前，您必须为 Magellan 设备充电。 有时，由于电量低，您必须更新 Magellan GPS。因此，您可以正确为设备充电。

您必须在其中再次正确更新设备。 只需按照如下所示的这些步骤进行操作：

我希望这些步骤有助于解决您因更新时间而出现的问题如果您的问题没有解决，那么您可以通过免费的实时聊天联系 Magellan GPS 专家。 技术专家随时可以帮助您免费更新 GPS 地图。



原文:

GarminGPS

Posted on Apr 26

Magellan map is a GPS application that helps users identify their far or nearby desired destination. It is a GPS application that tracks your real-time location by using the global positioning that enables the user to view all of its waypoints through a wide display free lifetime map. In case updating your Magellan GPS devices ensures a faster and better performing device. When you update your Magellan map you faced many problems. Various issues are created while you trying to download Magellan GPS Updates. Some issues get quickly resolved and some issues need to resolving by technical support.

This blog, provide easy troubleshooting steps to guide all users to resolve Magellan GPS updates problems.

Magellan GPS tracker:

Magellan GPS tracker is the fastest and most portable device that is used for tracking your whereabouts. It is also providing the exact location accurately. Magellan device is designed for marine. It is used for mapping fishing hotspots, and charting courses and water. It also shows that a real–tracking plotter and more accuracy than a built-in pressure-sensitive barometer.

Most Common issues in Magellan GPS update:

•Some Error messages while updating GPS.

•While updating maps it is locked up.

•Unable to make payment for paid Magellan map updates.

•Magellan GPS was unable to restore power after I got updates.

•The map is defiled and battery issues.

•Magellan GPS is not turn

Steps to fix Magellan GPS not Updating:

There are below some solutions to overcome GPS not updating issues. These points help to resolve your solution problems.

  1. Connect your device to the Internet.

  2. Reboot your device.

  3. Reset and charge your device.

  4. Update your device again.

1. Connect your device to the Internet:
Ensure that while you getting the latest Magellan GPS update, connect your device with the proper internet. Otherwise, if you are facing many problems, then check your internet speed online tools. If your internet speed slows follow these below steps:

•Remove all barriers that come to your both devices.

•Remove the device that is connected with your router then disconnect it now.

•There should be a minimum 2-3 feet gap in between both devices.

2.Reboot your device: In these steps, if you still fail in updating Magellan GPS then apply one, or more best solution that helps to resolve this problem. In this, you reboot your devices as soon as possible.

Rebooting is the best solution with deal these issues. While you rebooting your device make sure to disconnect the internet and then reboot your device and then again turn on the device after half an hour. After that, you can again connect it to the internet.

3. Reset and charge your device: Reset your Magellan GPS is the best method to resolve various Magellan update-related problems. Resetting your Magellan GPS device.

In another way, before you try to update the Magellan GPS firstly, you have to charge your Magellan device. Sometimes, you have to update Magellan GPS because of the low charge.So, you can charge your device properly.

4. Update your device again:
In which you have to update your devices again and properly. Simply follow these steps that shown below:

•Firstly, connect your USB with Magellan and other your device, then load the content manager application.

•Now, register in their application if you did not register and then click on the yes option.

•Wait a few minutes for the message your unit is connected and then right-click the content.

•Activating your Purchased Features and click on the ok button.

•Now, turn on your Magellan device and select the option that you want to update.

I hope these steps help to resolve your issues that occur due to updating time If your problem is not resolved then you can contact Magellan GPS experts through free Live Chat. Technical experts are always available to help you with the free GPS map updates.

item.title: 为开发人员举办虚拟活动 pt.2：结构、幻灯片和活动流程 | Hosting virtual events for developers pt.2: Structure, slide decks, and event flow
item.description:
在过去的两年里，虚拟活动获得了很大的关注和普及。 通过消除地理限制，开发者虚拟活动更易于访问，因为任何可以访问互联网的人都可以参加或举办自己的活动。

这个由三部分组成的博客系列的第二部分将为您提供我们关于如何：

  • 准备你的演讲，
  • 创建幻灯片，以及
  • 举办引人入胜的开发者活动。

有关寻找正确主题、目标受众、活动标题和活动描述的更多指导， 请查看第一篇文章。 在这篇文章中，我们将介绍：

选择一个重点话题和虚拟活动形式

对于开发人员来说，最好的虚拟活动是经过精心策划和执行的。 但在您考虑举办活动之前，需要做一些基础工作。 计划一个结构良好的演讲的两个关键方面：选择一个重点话题和提出一个高层次的结构。

为您的开发者活动选择一个狭窄的主题

您可能已经对要为虚拟活动谈论的内容有了一些想法。 关键是要决定你要采取什么角度。

对于技术开发人员活动，您可以谈论技术堆栈、库、工具、最佳实践，甚至是您见过的不良实践。 你的演讲也可以以职业为中心，分享开发人员为了进一步发展他们的职业应该具备的非技术技能。

无论是以编程为重点的活动还是与职业相关的活动，您都可以谈论无穷无尽的话题。 关键是缩小主题范围，以便您可以：

  • 深入解释您的观点和/或技术概念。
  • 坚持时间，让您的观众参与进来。
  • 留出足够的时间让与会者提问。

当有疑问时，一个好的起点是从你所知道的——以及你喜欢谈论的东西开始。 正如 Analytic Health 的常务董事兼数据科学主管Veerle所说：

如果您选择一个您已经在日常工作中忙碌的主题，您将能够谈论实际并给出有意义的示例（并且它需要更少的时间准备，因为您已经知道大部分内容😉）。

选择虚拟格式

接下来是选择适合您的在线活动的格式。 开发者虚拟活动的一些常见格式包括：

  • 演示文稿
  • 采访
  • 现场编码会议
  • 研讨会（例如调试、代码审查等）
  • 讨论（例如两个演讲者分享一个话题的不同方面）

这与主题选择有关：当您缩小演讲的重点时，演讲的形式也应该变得更加清晰。

为了让您的观众保持兴趣和参与度，以下是一些常见的格式以及在线活动应该持续多长时间：

提出一个高层次的结构

现在您已经选择了活动主题和形式，您可以开始构建活动的高级结构和一些细节。 确保谈话包括：

  • 您想分享的一个总体想法
  • 三到四点支持主旨
  • 真实世界的例子（技术和职业相关主题）

短篇小说和轶事也可以帮助您更好地传达您的想法。 打破僵局的一种方法是通过一个简短的故事开始您的在线活动，该故事展示您如何体验您将解决的问题。 你也可以用一个故事来总结你的谈话。 但请记住：如果这些故事没有直接相关性，就把它们删掉！

为了帮助您入门，我们将使用两个示例（一个技术示例和一个与职业相关的示例）来演示开发高级结构的过程。 随意将以下示例视为您的活动计划模板或虚拟活动策划者。

虚拟事件结构示例：技术主题

假设您是一名使用 JavaScript 的前端开发人员。 您曾多次遇到依赖注入，并认为这是一种不好的做法。 你的观点可能是：

依赖注入迫使你在不需要时使用 JavaScript 中的类。”

为了帮助您的听众理解您的观点并找到更好的依赖注入替代方案，您演讲的 3-4 个主要部分可能是：

  • 定义：什么是依赖注入
  • 用例/示例：依赖注入的一些示例
  • 论点：为什么你不应该使用依赖注入
  • 解决方案/结论：依赖注入的替代方案是什么

在线活动结构示例：职业相关主题

如果您想解决诸如“ 如何提高您的编程技能”之类的广泛主题，您必须花更多的时间来决定关注什么。 出于演示目的，假设您想关注初级开发人员，根据您的经验和所见，您认为：

除了传统的基于课堂的学习，寻找导师可以在我们的学习之旅中为我们提供极大的帮助。”

在这种情况下，您的在线活动的标题可能是“作为初级开发人员学习编程的最快方法”。 再一次，你想在开始之前提供一些基本信息。你还想确保使用真实世界的例子，并从你自己的经验中汲取灵感，让你的谈话更加相关和真实。 以下是你可以如何组织这次谈话：

  • 意见/示例：为什么需要提高初级开发人员的编程技能
  • 现状：面向初级开发人员的学习资源
  • 经验：导师如何快速跟踪我的学习经历
  • 结论：混合搭配学习方法来提高你的编程技能

无论您选择什么主题，用有形的真实示例充实您的体验至关重要。 清晰的结构可以帮助您的听众跟随。 有 3-4 个关键点，你应该在每个关键点上花费不超过 5 分钟。 如果您无法将其保持在 5 分钟以下，请减少您解决的点数。 您可以随时举办多个在线活动并将它们变成一个系列。

为虚拟活动组装出色的幻灯片

为什么您需要用于开发人员在线活动的幻灯片？

幻灯片是引导观众完成在线活动的主要内容。 它们有多种用途：

  • 帮助您记住关键点
  • 为您的演示文稿提供视觉提示
  • 使事情保持简洁和按计划进行
  • 提供（仅）必要的信息

此外，参加技术会议和演讲的开发人员经常在演示之前或之后要求提供演讲者幻灯片的副本。 作为演示者，您可以决定是否要共享幻灯片。 我们将在本节中介绍如何为开发人员在线活动创建幻灯片。

如何组织你的幻灯片

如果您是资深演讲者或参加过很多开发者大会和在线活动，您可能已经熟悉如何创建引人入胜的幻灯片。 但是，如果您不确定如何组织幻灯片，这里有一个关于如何组织幻灯片的一般指南：

介绍幻灯片

  • 第一张幻灯片：演讲的标题
  • 第二张幻灯片：简短的自我介绍
  • 第三张幻灯片：活动议程

主要部分幻灯片

  • 每个主要部分约 3 张幻灯片
  • 第一张幻灯片：演讲每个部分的标题页
  • 其他2~3张幻灯片：
    • 问题、陈述或定义
    • 建立您的案例的技术概念或支持统计数据
    • 突出显示重要部分的示例代码
    • 传达您观点的模因、GIF、数据可视化和插图

总结幻灯片

  • 演讲内容的要点摘要
  • 为您的受众提供的资源列表
  • 结束谈话的模因或 gif（如果相关）

以下是构建出色幻灯片的一些注意事项的简短列表：

您总能找到幻灯片模板，以帮助您减少设计时间，而将更多时间用于为您的在线活动提供优质内容！

创建引人入胜的在线活动体验

现在您已完成所有准备工作，是时候举办您的在线活动了！ 以下是在线活动每一步的一些提示，可帮助您取得成功。

虚拟活动开始前

为了让您的观众能够在整个活动期间关注、看到和听到您的声音，请确保您的环境已针对举办在线活动进行了优化：

  • 您的互联网连接稳定
  • 您的相机和麦克风工作，并设置在合适的距离/角度
  • 你在一个光线充足且安静的地方
  • 你的背景不会让人分心

在您的在线活动正式开始之前，请加入虚拟活动会议室来测试软件，以确保一切顺利进行。 如果可能，请一位朋友虚拟加入您的行列，以仔细检查视频和声音质量。 此外，请随时与您的听众提前分享您的幻灯片，以便他们熟悉您的演讲并在活动开始前提出问题。

开始您的在线活动

在正式开始演讲之前，您可能需要给与会者 2-3 分钟的时间加入。 大约一半的观众将提前或准时加入，而另一半将在正式开始时间的 3-5 分钟内加入。 在等待其他与会者加入时，您可以采取以下措施来保持观众的参与度：

  • 播放一些背景音乐来放松心情
  • 让您的观众知道您将在 2-3 分钟内开始活动
  • 在聊天中口头向与会者提出一两个问题，一些示例包括：
    • 大家都是从哪里加入的？
    • 你希望从这次活动中学到什么？
    • 您目前在工作中面临的最大挑战是什么？
  • 向与会者解释您将如何举办活动和问答
  • 在聊天中发布重要信息和公告（例如行为准则、问答格式、GitHub 存储库、链接等）

准备好开始后，请关闭背景音乐，让人群知道在线活动即将开始。

在您的虚拟活动期间

在大多数情况下，您将专注于演讲和演讲。 但由于您还将回答问题并主持活动，因此您还需要记住一些其他事项。

用于呈现：

  • 注意不要说得太快
  • 确保你参与和兴奋
  • 避免麦克风静电，但要确保你的听众能听到你的声音
  • 尽量不要从屏幕上读取
  • 像在面对面的活动中一样与您的听众交谈

对于托管：

  • 如果您的虚拟会议室不公开，则接纳与会者
  • 密切关注聊天中收到的评论和问题
  • 如果您不想在谈话期间被打扰，则默认您的与会者静音
  • 使用手机的计时器来调整自己的节奏

问答：

如果您希望在演讲结束时回答所有问题，请提醒您的听众，您将在最后解决问题，并要求他们将问题添加到聊天中（如果他们愿意）。 如果您希望虚拟活动更具互动性，请在每个部分的末尾暂停，询问与会者是否有任何问题。

无论您选择哪种格式，在最后一个问题的时候，请记住让活动参与者知道。

结束线上活动

回答完最后一个问题后，您自然可以进入虚拟活动的结束部分。

感谢观众的加入并向他们发送聊天中的重要链接（例如社交媒体、GitHub 存储库、未来的在线活动等）。 如果有任何未解决的问题，请提醒与会者在活动页面评论部分发布他们的问题。 在正式结束会议之前，请务必让人群知道活动已经结束。 以下是一些可以用来结束谈话的友好短语：

  • 以上就是今天的全部内容，感谢您的加入，如有任何问题，请随时在活动页面上发表评论！
  • 今天的活动就到此为止，如果您有任何问题，请随时在 Twitter 上给我发消息！
  • 这是今天的包装！ 感谢您的加入，我们很快再见。

一旦与会者开始离开虚拟会议室，您就可以结束所有人的会议。 完成在线活动后，还有其他一些后续工作要做，但现在，休息一下，去慢跑，或者庆祝一下成功举办了一场精彩的在线活动！

总结和下一步

我们刚刚向您介绍了如何准备和举办开发者在线活动。 通过缩小主题范围并设置高级结构，您可以集中您的演讲，从而以最有效的方式传达您的知识和分享。 您还可以分享活动记录，以便其他开发人员可以继续学习并从活动中获得启发。

在这个由三部分组成的系列的下一部分和最后一部分中，我们将分享更多关于宣传您的在线活动以及在活动结束后与您的观众互动的信息。 如果您不确定如何将您的活动推广给合适的开发人员，最后一篇博文将为您提供一些提示，并引导您了解 Codementor Events 如何帮助您解决此问题。

如果您已准备好与其他开发人员分享您的经验，请立即创建活动并成为 Codementor 活动发言人！



原文:

In the last two years, virtual events have gained a lot of traction and popularity. By removing the geographical constraints, developer virtual events are more accessible as anyone with access to the internet can attend or host their own events.

The second part of this three-part blog series will provide you with our recommendations on how to:

  • Prepare for your talk,
  • Create slide decks, and
  • Host engaging developer events.

For more guidance on finding the right topic, target audience, event title, and event description, check out the first article. In this post, we'll cover:

Pick a focused topic and virtual event format

The best virtual events for developers are well-planned and executed. But before you can think about hosting an event, there’s some groundwork to do. Two crucial aspects of planning out a well-structured talk: picking a focused topic and coming up with a high level structure.

Pick a narrow topic for your developer event

You probably already have some ideas about what you want to talk about for your virtual event. The key is to decide what angle you want to take.

For technical developer events, you can talk about tech stacks, libraries, tools, best practices, or even bad practices you’ve seen. Your talks can also be career-focused, where you share about non-technical skills that developers should have to further their career.

Whether it’s programming-focused or career-related events, there are endless topics you can speak on. The key is to narrow your topic down so you can:

  • Explain your point of view and/or technical concepts in depth.
  • Keep your audience engaged by sticking to the time.
  • Allow enough time for the attendees to ask questions.

When in doubt, a good place to start is with what you know — and what you’re comfortable talking about. As Veerle, Managing Direct and Head of Data Science at Analytic Health, shared:

If you choose a topic that you’re already busy with on a day-to-day basis you will be able to talk practical as well and give meaningful examples (and it requires less time preparing because you already know most of it 😉).

Select a virtual format

Next up is choosing the format that suits your online event. Some common formats for developer virtual events include:

  • Presentations
  • Interviews
  • Live coding sessions
  • Workshops (e.g. debugging, code review, etc.)
  • Discussions (e.g. two speakers sharing different sides of a topic)

This is linked to topic selection: as you’re narrowing down the focus of your talk, the format of your talk should become clearer as well.

To keep your audience interested and engaged, here are some common formats and how long online events should be:

Come up with a high level structure

Now that you’ve picked your event topic and format, you can start forming your event’s high level structure and some details. Make sure the talk includes:

  • One overarching idea you want to share
  • Three to four points to support the main idea
  • Real-world examples (for both technical and career-related topics)

Short stories and anecdotes can also help you convey your ideas better. One way to break the ice is to start your online events with a short story that demonstrates how you’ve experienced the problem you’ll address. You can also end with a story that sums up your talk. But remember: if the stories aren’t directly relevant, cut them out!

To help you get started, we’ll use two examples — one technical and one career-related — to demonstrate the process of developing a high level structure. Feel free to treat the following examples as your event program template or virtual event planner.

Virtual events structure example: Technical topic

Let’s say you’re a front-end developer who works with JavaScript. You have come across dependency injection a few times and think that it’s a bad practice. Your point of view might be:

“JavaScript is not a purely class based language and is flexible and dynamic. Dependency injection forces you to use a class in JavaScript when you don’t need to.”

To help your audience understand your point of view and find better alternatives to dependency injection, the 3-4 main sections of your talk could be:

  • Define: What is dependency injection
  • Use cases/examples: What are some examples of dependency injection
  • Argument: Why you shouldn’t use dependency injection
  • Solutions/conclusions: What are the alternatives to dependency injection

Online events structure example: Career-related topic

If you want to tackle a broad topic like “How to improve your programming skills,” you have to spend a bit more time deciding on what to focus on. For demonstration purposes, let’s say you want to focus on junior developers, and from what you’ve experienced and seen, you think:

“As junior developers, ramping up our programming skills to fit the company’s needs is crucial. In addition to traditional class-based learning, finding mentors can help us significantly in our learning journey.”

In this case, the title of your online event might be be “The fastest way to learn programming as a junior developer.” Once again, you want to provide some basic information before you jump in. You also want to make sure to use real-world examples and pull from your own experience to make your talk more relatable and authentic. Here’s how you might structure this talk:

  • Opinion/examples: Why you need to improve your programming skills as a junior developer
  • Status quo: Learning resources for junior developers
  • Experience: How mentors fast-tracked my learning experience
  • Conclusion: Mix and match learning methods to improve your programming skills

Regardless of the topic you choose, it’s crucial to flesh out your experience with tangible real-world examples. A clear structure helps your audience to follow along. With 3-4 key points, you should spend no more than 5 minutes on each. If you’re unable to keep it under 5 minutes, cut down on the number of points you address. You can always host multiple online events and turn them into a series.

Put together great slide decks for virtual events

Why do you need slide decks for developer online events?

Slide decks are the main content that guides your audience through your online event. They serve multiple purposes:

  • Helps you remember key points
  • Provides visual cues for your presentation
  • Keeps things concise and on schedule
  • Delivers (only the) necessary information

Additionally, developers who attend tech conferences and talks often ask for copies of speakers’ slide decks before or after the presentation. As the presenter, you can decide if you want to share your slide decks. We'll walk through how to create a slide deck for developer online events in this section.

How to organize your slides

If you’re a veteran speaker or have attended a lot of developer conferences and online events, you're probably already familiar with creating engaging slide decks. But if you’re not sure how to organize your slides, here’s a general guideline for how your slides can be organized:

Introduction slides

  • 1st slide: Title of your talk
  • 2nd slide: Short self-introduction
  • 3rd slide: Agenda of the event

Main section slides

  • ~3 slides for each main section
  • First slide: Title page for each section of your talk
  • The other 2~3 slides:
    • Questions, statements, or definitions
    • Technical concepts or supporting stats to build up your case
    • Sample code with the important parts highlighted
    • Memes, gifs, data visualizations, and illustrations that convey your point

Wrap up slides

  • ~1-2 slides
  • Bullet point summary of what was covered in the talk
  • A list of resources for your audience
  • A meme or gif to close up the talk (if relevant)

Here’s a short list of some do’s and don’ts for building a great slide deck:

You can always find slide deck templates to help you spend less time on design and more on delivering quality content for your online events!

Create engaging online events experience

Now that you’re finished with all the prep work, it’s time to host your online event! Here are some tips for every step of your online event to help you succeed.

Before the virtual event starts

For your audience to be able to follow, see, and hear you throughout the entire duration of your event, make sure your environment is optimized for hosting online events:

  • Your Internet connection is stable
  • Your camera and mic work, and set at a suitable distance/angle
  • You’re at a spot that’s well-lit and quiet
  • Your background isn’t distracting

Before your online event officially starts, join the virtual event meeting room to test out the software to make sure everything runs smoothly. If possible, ask a friend to join you virtually to double check the video and sound quality. Additionally, feel free to share your slides with your audience ahead of time so they can familiarize themselves with your talk and come up with questions before the event.

Starting your online event

Before you officially start your talk, you might want to give the attendees 2-3 minutes to join. About half of the audience will join either early or on-time, while the other half will join within 3-5 minutes of the official start time. While you’re waiting for other attendees to join, here are some things you can do to keep your audience engaged:

  • Play some background music to lighten up the mood
  • Let your audience know you’ll start the event in 2-3 minutes
  • Ask the attendees a question or two verbally and in the chat, some examples include:
    • Where is everyone joining from?
    • What do you hope to learn from this event?
    • What is the biggest challenge you’re currently facing at work?
  • Explain how you’ll run the event and Q&A to your attendees
  • Post important information and announcements in chat (e.g. code of conduct, Q&A format, GitHub repo, links, etc.)

Once you’re ready to start, turn off your background music and let the crowd know the online event will be starting soon.

During your virtual event

For the most part, you’ll be focused on presenting and speaking. But since you’ll also be answering questions and hosting the event, there are some additional things you want to keep in mind.

For presenting:

  • Be careful not to speak too fast
  • Make sure you’re engaged and excited
  • Avoid mic static but make sure your audience can hear you
  • Try not to read off of your screen
  • Speak to your audience like you would at in-person events

For hosting:

  • Admit attendees if your virtual meeting room is not public
  • Keep an eye on the chat for incoming comments and questions
  • Default your attendees to mute if you don’t want intrusions during your talk
  • Use your phone’s timer to pace yourself

For Q&A:

If you’d like all questions to be answered at the end of the talk, remind your audience that you’ll address the questions at the end and ask them to add their questions to chat if they’d like to. If you want your virtual event to be more interactive, pause at the end of each section to ask the attendees if they have any questions.

Regardless of the format you choose, when it’s time for the last question, remember to let the event attendees know.

Ending the online event

After you’ve answered the last question, you can naturally segue into the closing part of the virtual event.

Thank the audience for joining and send them important links in the chat (e.g. social media, GitHub repos, future online events, etc.). If there are any unanswered questions, remind the attendee to post their questions in the event page comment section. Before you officially end the meeting, make sure to let the crowd know that the event is over. Here are some friendly phrases you can use to end the talk:

  • That’s all for today, thanks for joining me and feel free to comment on the event page with any questions!
  • That’s it for our event today, feel free to message me on Twitter if you have any questions!
  • That’s a wrap for today! Thanks for joining and see you soon.

Once attendees start leaving the virtual meeting room, you can end the meeting for all. There are some other follow ups to do after you finish your online events, but for now, take a break, go on a jog, or celebrate a bit for successfully hosting a great online event!

Wrap up & next steps

We’ve just walked you through preparing for and hosting a developer online event. By narrowing down your topic and setting the high-level structure, you’re able to focus your talk so it conveys your knowledge and sharing in the most effective way. You can also share the event recordings so other developers can continue to learn and be inspired by the event.

In the next and last part of this three-part series, we’ll share more about promoting your online events and engaging with your audience after the event. If you’re not sure how you can promote your events to the right developers, the last blog post will provide you with some tips and walk you through how Codementor Events will help with that.

If you’re ready to share your experience with other developers, create events and become a Codementor Events speaker now!

item.title: 圣奥古斯丁最好的美容牙科 | The Best Cosmetic Dentistry in Saint Augustine
item.description:
美容牙科是指可用于改变牙齿大小、形状和排列的治疗方法。 治疗可用于填充空间、矫正咬合、增亮牙齿颜色、更换缺失的牙齿、更换旧的牙科治疗，以及修复腐烂、碎裂、破裂或破损的牙齿。 圣奥古斯丁的美容牙科有多种价格可供选择，可以快速解决一些美容牙科更常见的问题。

亚历山大·库埃德洛—— Apr 25 4月25日



原文:

Cosmetic dentistry refers to treatments available to change the size, shape, and alignment of teeth. Treatments are available to fill in spaces, correct the bite, brighten the color of the teeth, replace missing teeth, replace old dental treatments, and repair decayed, chipped, cracked, or broken teeth. Cosmetic dentistry in St Augustine is available at a range of prices and offers quick relief from some of cosmetic dentistry's more common issues.

Alexandre Couedelo - Apr 25
